Fellow Conservative,

Have you kept up with the news lately? If you have, you are most likely aware of the outrageous $3.5 TRILLION spending bill the Democrats are attempting to pass. This is not a bipartisan bill, but rather, an excuse for the Radical Left to go on a massive spending spree to fill their pockets!

Since Ted is running a campaign on getting things done for the people and fighting for what they believe in, we wanted to reach out to see what you have to say about the issue.
|
### ↓↓↓ Answer Below ↓↓↓
### Do you believe passing a $3.5 trillion spending package is the right thing for our country moving forward?
| [** Yes! **](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=4bcd54f20ae34bc0944ec58083341e19&_e=OkummfeaWsTqRM87m4ZeqJ8I287YvsuwJ3D9OMDH93G5g-w7O02A06lIEQJjHjy9SG6n5A9c7_7Kn6PYSNPkq91rgylIz87gJoq4iH2p9NfCFpZ03nBdKC-NjUTESvw7njGiJVoExCgprsFZHF3h2lUd_J3RKgQnUTfM9arop9E2tTpy8MUTTYG4cgpgP1p3VL1qTBkP0eCbrbtHBrH8_5CkD97RWWdH7Nypkc1niUn-EYrHFULR-fouh0mK2NMkmyrDhTM_LYsoPDO1dMzhCxehP0sBaCUPly6gPanZcnN-K3KsQG5KknRj2L_mEyW3E0rFTpOTUSc236N1TzYtLUzzo5zJW75Zdm7SZtebMl94lKD4VLli6K0JItp2IhpdIiisXEwhBT9CMvEMSFuk2sZ1tSG-PliAd4k9wSPEr5wLwL4vJC-6O-d6dqsNM_Q0bbdegrP_HzBrC8sqzj0hYIYUjP7gj58V4i_OiLY4vDE%3D)

[** NO! **](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=4bcd54f20ae34bc0944ec58083341e19&_e=OkummfeaWsTqRM87m4ZeqJ8I287YvsuwJ3D9OMDH93G5g-w7O02A06lIEQJjHjy9SG6n5A9c7_7Kn6PYSNPkq91rgylIz87gJoq4iH2p9NfCFpZ03nBdKC-NjUTESvw7njGiJVoExCgprsFZHF3h2lUd_J3RKgQnUTfM9arop9E2tTpy8MUTTYG4cgpgP1p3VL1qTBkP0eCbrbtHBrH8_5CkD97RWWdH7Nypkc1niUn-EYrHFULR-fouh0mK2NMkmyrDhTM_LYsoPDO1dMzhC-c-f9E2WKvTqwarlvDYoBmt72-k-DcGc7jHzkl8smMrRY9B7a4WshQ5tmjG_VDI-wPtCCyWt0WF1jKb4yqfpb_P4CA6wHys_m-sBfRN-YHWptTeuVMPHkr6-sq25WNCA6hXK76Ay-6sXwNLx0koVZeTBtlIcS8hOTqSaxDUQZPyqlZwlhODF_vodzyuqu8KkWDCYH2qc5JtfGdJ5mCg3iU%3D)

Thank you!

DeSantis has failed Florida in every possible way. He’s:
* Signed a sweeping voter suppression bill into law.
* Opened pop-up COVID-19 vaccine sites in rich Florida neighborhoods full of his political donors.
* Jet-setted across America on a fundraising tour while the Delta variant sickened and killed Floridians.
* Banned mask requirements in schools and threatened to withhold pay from officials who’ve implemented them.
* Urged the U.S. Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade.
* Signed laws restricting abortion access.
* Said he might support an abortion ban like the one in Texas.
* Refused to accept that climate change is an existential threat to our state.
* Failed to prepare Florida’s coastal communities for rising sea levels and stronger hurricanes.

... and this isn’t even a comprehensive list of his failures!

clean_body: | | | Derek, we need to know: Do you support Gov. Ron DeSantis? If your answer is NO , then split a quick donation between Charlie Crist for Governor and Common Good VA! Charlie CAN defeat Gov. DeSantis! Gov. DeSantis has failed Florida in every possible way. He’s: Signed a sweeping voter suppression bill into law. Opened pop-up COVID-19 vaccine sites in rich Florida neighborhoods full of his political donors. Jet-setted across America on a fundraising tour while the Delta variant sickened and killed Floridians. Banned mask requirements in schools and threatened to withhold pay from officials who’ve implemented them. Urged the U.S. Supreme Court to overturn Roe v. Wade. Signed laws restricting abortion access. Said he might support an abortion ban like the one in Texas. Refused to accept that climate change is an existential threat to our state. Failed to prepare Florida’s coastal communities for rising sea levels and stronger hurricanes. ... and this isn’t even a comprehensive list of his failures! One thing is clear: Gov. DeSantis doesn’t care about Floridians. He only cares about his presidential ambitions and satisfying his wealthy donors. ** \- Team Crist | Paid for by Common Good Virginia | | Sent via . ****
Terry’s opponent says he’s proud to have Donald Trump’s endorsement. He even added “Donald Trump represents so much of why I’m running.”

And he’s putting his money where his mouth is. He has supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories and pushed an agenda of restricting voter access.

On the other hand, Terry is a champion for our freedom to vote. As Governor, he restored voting rights to more people than any other Governor in history. He fought hard to make sure Virginia was one of the most welcoming, inclusive and forward-looking places in the country. But if Terry’s opponent wins, he’ll take the Commonwealth backwards.

**In state after state across the country, we have seen that governors play a large role in determining whether access is restricted or expanded. We must hold the line in Virginia to protect and expand progress.**

clean_body: | | | = | | Derek, Just like the focus was on Georgia in 2020, all eyes will be on Virginia in 2021. My friend Terry McAuliffe is running for Governor against an extreme culture warrior who has the backing of Donald Trump and Ted Cruz. Derek, Virginia made incredible progress under Terry’s leadership. If his opponent succeeds in using his deep pockets to buy the Virginia Governor's office, he will reverse the progress made across the Commonwealth. For Terry to win, he’ll need to build the biggest grassroots army in the history of Virginia politics. He can do it, but he needs our help. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Terry’s opponent says he’s proud to have Donald Trump’s endorsement. He even added “Donald Trump represents so much of why I’m running.” And he’s putting his money where his mouth is. He has supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories and pushed an agenda of restricting voter access. On the other hand, Terry is a champion for our freedom to vote. As Governor, he restored voting rights to more people than any other Governor in history. He fought hard to make sure Virginia was one of the most welcoming, inclusive and forward-looking places in the country. But if Terry’s opponent wins, he’ll take the Commonwealth backwards. In state after state across the country, we have seen that governors play a large role in determining whether access is restricted or expanded. We must hold the line in Virginia to protect and expand progress. So here is the deal: if we do our part to elect Terry in Virginia, we can send a message to the entire country that our Democracy is stronger than ever. We can demonstrate that candidates who support voter suppression and Donald Trump’s big lie will be met with a groundswell of grassroots resistance. =** I’m counting on you, Derek. Stacey Abrams = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click._ Paid for by Terry for Virginia

| | Derek, I just got an update from Terry.

He told me that his team has analyzed the initial totals from early voting, and if we want to win big in November, we need to mobilize more Democrats.

There’s not much time left in this race, Derek, so every day makes a huge difference.

**We've seen incredible Democratic enthusiasm in Virginia in recent elections — from the 2017 statewide Democratic sweep to flipping the General Assembly blue in 2019 to Joe Biden's 10-point victory last fall — and we can't let that enthusiasm dip this year. It's just too important.**

Terry told me that he needs to ramp up his voter outreach and mobilization efforts right away — because the only way he’ll be able to win this race is if he can reach every single voter in Virginia with his message about the stakes of this election.

_**[So I’m coming to you on his behalf to ask for your support. Will you chip in any amount to Terry’s campaign right now? clean_body: We need to talk to more voters in Virginia | | | = | | Derek, I just got an update from Terry. He told me that his team has analyzed the initial totals from early voting, and if we want to win big in November, we need to mobilize more Democrats. There’s not much time left in this race, Derek, so every day makes a huge difference. We've seen incredible Democratic enthusiasm in Virginia in recent elections — from the 2017 statewide Democratic sweep to flipping the General Assembly blue in 2019 to Joe Biden's 10-point victory last fall — and we can't let that enthusiasm dip this year. It's just too important. Terry told me that he needs to ramp up his voter outreach and mobilization efforts right away — because the only way he’ll be able to win this race is if he can reach every single voter in Virginia with his message about the stakes of this election. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you for your support, Tim Kaine =** Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. | | Happy Indigenous Peoples’ Day, folks! Today, we celebrate Native American people, their histories, and cultures. There is still so much work to be done in the fight for our collective freedom. [**In honor of a day that means a lot to me and my community, will you sign on to show your support for making Indigenous Peoples’ Day a federally recognized holiday?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37421759/310994021/-463283081?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjM2MTIyNy05MzJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iPmvMfZtz-r5v5ZXR3p840Nx7-zkoeJ4SpO_3EK1Iuo=&emci=fc243033-5b28-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=eb361227-932a-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=18922910) | | | [Sign on](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37421761/310994024/-463283081?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjM2MTIyNy05MzJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iPmvMfZtz-r5v5ZXR3p840Nx7-zkoeJ4SpO_3EK1Iuo=&emci=fc243033-5b28-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=eb361227-932a-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=18922910)

My family and I are members of the Lumbee Tribe of North Carolina -- named after the Lumber River that winds through my home county.
In 1956, Congress recognized the Lumbee as an Indian tribe, but denied us any federal benefits -- something our People are still fighting today.
This story is not unique -- Native Americans all across the U.S. are fighting for recognition, equal rights as citizens, reliable healthcare, justice for our missing women and girls, and much more.
And, despite all the adversity Native people face, Indigenous Peoples’ Day _still_ isn’t federally recognized.
[**Will you sign your name next to mine to show your support for recognizing Indigenous Peoples’ Day as a Federal Holiday?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37421764/310994027/-463283081?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjE4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYjM2MTIyNy05MzJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iPmvMfZtz-r5v5ZXR3p840Nx7-zkoeJ4SpO_3EK1Iuo=&emci=fc243033-5b28-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=eb361227-932a-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=18922910)

Raphael Warnock** Raphael Warnock won a special election to flip Georgia Blue, handing Democrats a 50/50 Senate majority. name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: Former 6th District GOP chair Dave McCleary endorses Jake
body:
"We need a candidate with vision, and we have that in my friend Jake Evans.”
---
| | | | | |
---
| | For immediate release Oct. 12, 2021 Former 6th District GOP chair endorses Jake Former 6th Congressional District GOP Chairman Dave McCleary today announced his support for Jake Evans' 6th Congressional District campaign. "As a longtime resident of Roswell and Georgia's 6th Congressional District, my No. 1 political goal for 2022 is to bring put our district back into Republican hands," McCleary said. "We need a bold conservative, we need a worker and we need a candidate with vision, and we have that in my friend Jake Evans." In addition to his leadership role in the 6th District GOP, McCleary is a Roswell small business owner, former Roswell Rotary president and a local leader in the effort to end human trafficking, including as a member of the commission formed by Georgia First Lady Marty Kemp. McCleary held leadership positions in campaigns for Sens. Johnny Isakson and David Perdue as well as Congressman Tom Price. "Dave is a pillar of the Roswell community, someone who's earned his good reputation by constantly giving of himself to improve his community," Jake said. "Dave has worked for years on many successful Republican campaigns, so it's not just an honor to have him on my side, but it's also a relief."
(470) 588-2028 Contact: news@jakeevans.org
---

Dear Friends and Neighbors,

Today we celebrate Indigenous Peoples’ Day. May we honor the Native American people, their culture, their heritage, and their history.

While many people know this day as Columbus Day, observers of Indigenous Peoples’ Day condemn his participation in the violent colonization of America. Today, there are over 600 Native Nations in the US, yet these Americans are still experiencing discrimination.

It’s our responsibility as non-indigenous people to reflect and acknowledge the past while moving forward with change for our native people.

We encourage you to celebrate today with our Native American friends and neighbors by learning more about their spirited culture. Let’s honor their rich history, raise awareness of their unique struggles, and commit to a more intersectional future!

**Happy Indigenous Peoples’ Day!**

**_Barrier To Entry PAC_**

clean_body: Let us celebrate, honor & reflect. | | | = = Dear Friends and Neighbors, Today we celebrate Indigenous Peoples’ Day. May we honor the Native American people, their culture, their heritage, and their history. While many people know this day as Columbus Day, observers of Indigenous Peoples’ Day condemn his participation in the violent colonization of America. Today, there are over 600 Native Nations in the US, yet these Americans are still experiencing discrimination. It’s our responsibility as non-indigenous people to reflect and acknowledge the past while moving forward with change for our native people. We encourage you to celebrate today with our Native American friends and neighbors by learning more about their spirited culture. Let’s honor their rich history, raise awareness of their unique struggles, and commit to a more intersectional future! Happy Indigenous Peoples’ Day! name: Jasmine
subject: My coming out story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
---
| | | Below is a longer, personal note about my coming out story. If you're able to pitch in, [**please click here to make a donation.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37428173/311022102/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211011_FR_ComingOut_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWM4OGZlNi05ZDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Imy7pgptVKKcGovlX1YPjH5S9xPl3vQESMCHrBmU9uU=)
---
Peter: This is a longer, but especially important, email about why I’m running for Congress to defeat Madison Cawthorn.
It’s also National Coming Out Day so I thought I’d share my coming out story with you and some thoughts on how that connects to this moment and my campaign.
[**I hope after you’re done reading, you’ll chip in $25 or more to ensure we have the resources to fund our organizing work and run a winning campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37428174/311022103/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211011_FR_ComingOut_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWM4OGZlNi05ZDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Imy7pgptVKKcGovlX1YPjH5S9xPl3vQESMCHrBmU9uU=)
| | [Donate ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37428175/311022104/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211011_FR_ComingOut_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWM4OGZlNi05ZDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Imy7pgptVKKcGovlX1YPjH5S9xPl3vQESMCHrBmU9uU=)
---
As a LGBTQ person, you never really stop coming out. Instead, it’s a part of daily life, with countless moments and choices about how you talk about your life, how you dress, how you move through the world.
That’s true for me right now, as we campaign across Western NC, knocking doors, organizing in parking lots and back yards. The moment I introduce myself and talk about my family -- Meg and our three kids, the four loves of my life -- I come out again. Each time, I feel proud and I am also reminded why coming out matters.
Sometimes I also feel that familiar feeling of my pulse racing. When you come out to a stranger, you do not know how they will react. But what I have learned again and again is that, inevitably, there is someone in the room who also needs to hear those words, and that makes it worth it to say them.
For me, this process started when I was 18 and came out for the first time. It ushered in a new chapter of my life -- one that was both more honest and riskier. Telling the truth about who I am was an enormous relief on one hand; on the other, it tested some of the most important relationships in my life.
And it meant letting go of a lot. I stopped feeling at home in the church, even though my faith never wavered. It wasn’t easy to imagine a future for myself in North Carolina, as much as this was home to me.
I knew that ultimately this was where I belonged, even though I still harbored questions, and sometimes fear, about what it would mean to be out here. I started organizing political campaigns and LGBTQ rights campaigns. And I met my wife Meghann.
When we got married in 2008, our marriage was not legally recognized in North Carolina, or most places in the country. It was a daily reminder to us of the work that needed to happen.
When I followed a call to ministry, I knew that part of my work would focus on the public square and what it means to be a LGBTQ person of faith in the South. So with Meghann’s support, we launched the Campaign for Southern Equality together.
We were told that what we were doing was unrealistic and that we were reaching way beyond the stars. But with patience and grit, we kept pushing forward. And finally, marriage equality became legal across all 50 states.
**That’s why on this National Coming Out Day, I’m celebrating all of the progress that’s been made and reflecting on how far we still have to go. On a daily basis, I’m reminded of what’s at stake, especially for LGBTQ youth who are bravely coming out.**
If we’re going to ensure our laws finally work to fully protect LGBTQ people, then we must defend and expand our House and Senate majorities and pass the Equality Act.
We never gave up on the fight for marriage equality until we won. That’s how I feel about this race to be the next NC-11 representative.
[**We win when we work together. Will you please chip in $25 or more today to our grassroots campaign to help us spread our message and organize across Western NC.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37428176/311022105/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211011_FR_ComingOut_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWM4OGZlNi05ZDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Imy7pgptVKKcGovlX1YPjH5S9xPl3vQESMCHrBmU9uU=)
| | [Donate $25 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37428177/311022106/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211011_FR_ComingOut_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWM4OGZlNi05ZDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Imy7pgptVKKcGovlX1YPjH5S9xPl3vQESMCHrBmU9uU=)
---
| | [Other amount ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37428178/311022107/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211011_FR_ComingOut_A0_na_U1_X1&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWM4OGZlNi05ZDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Imy7pgptVKKcGovlX1YPjH5S9xPl3vQESMCHrBmU9uU=)
---
National Coming Out Day is about celebrating the LGBTQ community. It’s about supporting people who are coming out for the first time. And it’s about recommitting to being brave and strong about working to create a world where things considered “impossible” actually happen.
We’re in this together -- always.
\-- Jasmine

| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37428179/311022108/-1793828317?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWM4OGZlNi05ZDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Imy7pgptVKKcGovlX1YPjH5S9xPl3vQESMCHrBmU9uU=&emci=dd95babe-7528-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=1ac88fe6-9d2a-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=22032259)

clean_body: | | | Below is a longer, personal note about my coming out story. If you're able to pitch in, = Peter: This is a longer, but especially important, email about why I’m running for Congress to defeat Madison Cawthorn. It’s also National Coming Out Day so I thought I’d share my coming out story with you and some thoughts on how that connects to this moment and my campaign. = | | = As a LGBTQ person, you never really stop coming out. Instead, it’s a part of daily life, with countless moments and choices about how you talk about your life, how you dress, how you move through the world. That’s true for me right now, as we campaign across Western NC, knocking doors, organizing in parking lots and back yards. The moment I introduce myself and talk about my family -- Meg and our three kids, the four loves of my life -- I come out again. Each time, I feel proud and I am also reminded why coming out matters. Sometimes I also feel that familiar feeling of my pulse racing. When you come out to a stranger, you do not know how they will react. But what I have learned again and again is that, inevitably, there is someone in the room who also needs to hear those words, and that makes it worth it to say them. For me, this process started when I was 18 and came out for the first time. It ushered in a new chapter of my life -- one that was both more honest and riskier. Telling the truth about who I am was an enormous relief on one hand; on the other, it tested some of the most important relationships in my life. And it meant letting go of a lot. I stopped feeling at home in the church, even though my faith never wavered. It wasn’t easy to imagine a future for myself in North Carolina, as much as this was home to me. I knew that ultimately this was where I belonged, even though I still harbored questions, and sometimes fear, about what it would mean to be out here. I started organizing political campaigns and LGBTQ rights campaigns. And I met my wife Meghann. When we got married in 2008, our marriage was not legally recognized in North Carolina, or most places in the country. It was a daily reminder to us of the work that needed to happen. When I followed a call to ministry, I knew that part of my work would focus on the public square and what it means to be a LGBTQ person of faith in the South. So with Meghann’s support, we launched the Campaign for Southern Equality together. We were told that what we were doing was unrealistic and that we were reaching way beyond the stars. But with patience and grit, we kept pushing forward. And finally, marriage equality became legal across all 50 states. That’s why on this National Coming Out Day, I’m celebrating all of the progress that’s been made and reflecting on how far we still have to go. On a daily basis, I’m reminded of what’s at stake, especially for LGBTQ youth who are bravely coming out. If we’re going to ensure our laws finally work to fully protect LGBTQ people, then we must defend and expand our House and Senate majorities and pass the Equality Act. We never gave up on the fight for marriage equality until we won. That’s how I feel about this race to be the next NC-11 representative. = | | = | | = National Coming Out Day is about celebrating the LGBTQ community. It’s about supporting people who are coming out for the first time. And it’s about recommitting to being brave and strong about working to create a world where things considered “impossible” actually happen. We’re in this together -- always. \-- Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | = | Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress PO Box 7553 Asheville, NC 28802 United States mailto:info@jasmineforcongress.com

subject: I’m a Democrat with a record of winning
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEPASQUALE FOR PA-10 |
body:
Team,

First, Perry conspired with Trump to fire the attorney general and overturn the 2020 presidential election.

Then, he led efforts to throw out his own state’s electoral votes, voted against honoring Capitol police officers, voted against the Violence Against Women Act and against the Asian American Hate Crimes bill.

Now, he’s continuing his extremist, ineffective career by obstructing and opposing President Biden’s popular agenda at every turn -- even legislation with overwhelming bipartisan support.

There are a growing number of extremists in Congress, but Scott Perry is at the center, working behind the scenes to undermine our democracy. However, unlike Jim Jordan, Marjorie Taylor Greene, or other members of the extremist caucus, Scott Perry sits in a swing district, and he’s vulnerable. We can defeat him in 2022.

I’m a Democrat with a proven record of winning in a swing state. I’m a father, a coach, a professor, and a two-term Auditor General who knows how to win. Together, we came within 3 points of flipping this seat in 2020, and I’m asking you to join my team today to help unseat Scott Perry in 2022. Let’s finish what we started and win this thing!

Join us today by chipping in $10 or whatever you can.

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/depasqualeoct2021?refcode=EM_FR_211011FR_N_ED_90DA_7_NG_N_PT]

Thank you,

Eugene DePasquale

Eugene DePasquale has dedicated his public service to tirelessly fighting for working people, our senior citizens, and our most vulnerable. Will you pitch in any amount to help us elect a real leader to represent PA-10?

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Here's what we're looking at:

body:
Defeating Sen. Grassley – in what the Des Moines Register is calling a "marquee matchup" – will come down to resources...
| | |
---
**Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) recently announced he's running for reelection. I fully intend to defeat him and flip Iowa blue, Peter – but I need you with me. Here's the latest:**
**First** , the momentum is on _our_ side. Nearly two-thirds of Iowa voters _don't_ want to reelect Sen. Grassley, which means we have a unique opportunity and advantage that we must harness to flip this Senate seat blue.
**But** defeating Sen. Grassley – in what the Des Moines Register is calling a "marquee matchup" – will come down to resources, and the campaign arm of the Senate Republicans has already hauled in $76 million this year. They are well equipped to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley and attack competitive challengers like me.
**So right now,** ahead of our next big fundraising deadline, my team and I need to raise another $25,000 to keep pace with our fundraising. This is a grassroots campaign, and hitting these goals and building up resources is how we will flip Iowa blue.

clean_body: Defeating Sen. Grassley – in what the Des Moines Register is calling a "marquee matchup" – will come down to resources... | | | Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA) recently announced he's running for reelection. I fully intend to defeat him and flip Iowa blue, Peter – but I need you with me. Here's the latest: First , the momentum is on our side. Nearly two-thirds of Iowa voters don't want to reelect Sen. Grassley, which means we have a unique opportunity and advantage that we must harness to flip this Senate seat blue. But defeating Sen. Grassley – in what the Des Moines Register is calling a "marquee matchup" – will come down to resources, and the campaign arm of the Senate Republicans has already hauled in $76 million this year. They are well equipped to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley and attack competitive challengers like me. So right now, ahead of our next big fundraising deadline, my team and I need to raise another $25,000 to keep pace with our fundraising. This is a grassroots campaign, and hitting these goals and building up resources is how we will flip Iowa blue. = | | = I fully intend to win this race, and if we defeat Sen. Grassley and flip Iowa blue, then Democrats are virtually guaranteed to hold the Senate majority. So please, can I count on you to help me hit this $25,000 grassroots fundraising goal? = Thanks for all you do. – Abby | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Aaron Jacobs
subject: Update on Senator Hassan's campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |
---
I'll keep this quick, friend, but I wanted to update you on the state of this race and what we are doing to keep New Hampshire and our Senate blue. In 2016, Maggie Hassan won by only 1,017 votes, and this year it could be even closer. Republicans only need to flip one seat to take back the Senate, and Mitch McConnell is all in on New Hampshire. **CNN even reported that Maggie is one of the most vulnerable Senators up for reelection.** That's why we're starting earlier than ever before to get staff on the ground, reach every Granite Stater, and build a winning campaign. This means that we check our numbers monthly, weekly, and even daily to make sure we’re on track to hit every goal we set. Every dollar and deadline plays a crucial role in our long-term strategy. With top Republicans dumping millions of dollars into New Hampshire, there's no room for error. **[I'm reaching out today to ask if you can chip in $5 to help us build the resources needed to compete. What you give will help us invest in TV and digital ads, targeted mail, and on-the-ground organizers to share Maggie's accomplishments and combat misinformation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37428767/311025119/-214106137?refcode=e20211011_aj-update&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2EyZTgwMi1hMjJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gw6A4oXKN-T1kGfvs_Aj0zspOKJFgwdB0J8M9s_0T3w=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37428768/311025120/-214106137?refcode=e20211011_aj-update&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyY2EyZTgwMi1hMjJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gw6A4oXKN-T1kGfvs_Aj0zspOKJFgwdB0J8M9s_0T3w=)

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: ICYMI: The Past Two Weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

The past two weeks since I announced my campaign to run in Texas' 38th Congressional district have been absolutely amazing. Last week, over 20 volunteers joined me on Saturday to help knock on over two thousand doors this week, while having a huge Meet and Greet in Willowbrook that same afternoon! I am truly honored and humbled by the overwhelming support I have received from voters, grassroots supporters, and local and national conservative figures. My campaign and I have made a ton of announcements in the last two weeks, and I want to make sure you didn't mass anything! Please find below some of the exciting news we released**.**

clean_body: Friend, The past two weeks since I announced my campaign to run in Texas' 38th Congressional district have been absolutely amazing. Last week, over 20 volunteers joined me on Saturday to help knock on over two thousand doors this week, while having a huge Meet and Greet in Willowbrook that same afternoon! I am truly honored and humbled by the overwhelming support I have received from voters, grassroots supporters, and local and national conservative figures. My campaign and I have made a ton of announcements in the last two weeks, and I want to make sure you didn't mass anything! Please find below some of the exciting news we released. body:
MEET MTG VIRTUAL RECEPTION OCTOBER 18
100 SPOTS AVAILABLE
Reserve your spot to LIVE CHAT FaceTime with
Marjorie Taylor Greene.

Peter -- Since the moment I was sworn in,
the Democrats and the D.C. Swamp have painted a big red target on
my back.
They tried to expel and remove from Congress.
They stripped me of my committees.
And now, they've recruited several Democrats
and RINO "Republicans" to take me out next election.
Why?
Because I want to: Impeach Biden and Fire
Fauci.
I want Stop the Democrat takeover of our
elections. I want to stop AOC's Green New Deal.
I want Ilhan Omar investigated for marrying
her brother and committing fraud against the American people.
But my greatest crime? Supporting President
Trump and the America First agenda.
I'm not backing down.
And I want to tell you all about it --
face-to-face!

I'm having a virtual meet & greet with some
of my top supporters and I'd love to meet you.
I'll give you the inside details of the halls
of Congress -- like Nancy Pelosi's plan to destroy America --
that the Fake News Media refuses to tell you about.

Included)

for Live Chat

Call from MTG
Only 100 open spots! Reserve your exclusive
ticket today for $100!
The Democrats prepared to unleash MILLIONS of
dollars to take me out. Some political experts even expect
$15-$20 million spent against me. . .
Your donation helps me fight back and save my
seat for the 2022 election.
I will never stop fighting. I will never give
up. I will never back down.
hope I can count on you!

-- Marjorie Taylor Greene
Congresswoman (R-GA)

name: Laurie Bishop
subject: Today is Indigenous Peoples' Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Laurie Bishop for Montana
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37432127/311034919/-295802285?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211011idp_lb_active_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjdlZmJlZC1hNzJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mG-8V5uz01Dcn5scJbqM2cwduTrnrfmnj-Arbyz9P9c=)
---
Friend, today is Indigenous Peoples' Day. Today is a day for acknowledging that Native Americans are the first inhabitants of this land, appreciating the countless contributions Indigenous people have made to our state and country, and raising their stories as we learn the history of our nation. Montana is home to seven reservations and twelve tribal nations: Assiniboine, Blackfeet, Chippewa, Cree, Crow, Gros Ventre, Kootenai, Little Shell Chippewa, Northern Cheyenne, Pend d'Oreille, Salish and Sioux. Our state is also home to numerous Native Americans of other tribes who keep their heritage alive. We recommit ourselves to standing side-by-side with Native Americans and advocating for their rights, from being a partner in shining a light on the missing and murdered Indigenous people epidemic, to pushing back on voter suppression efforts aimed at silencing Native American voices. On Friday, President Biden signed the first proclamation to observe Indigenous Peoples’ Day today, but in order to ensure the significance of the day is celebrated every year, we need Congress to act. **[Add your name to join me in calling on Congress to make Indigenous Peoples’ Day a federal holiday across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37432130/311034920/7916453?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211011idp_lb_active_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjdlZmJlZC1hNzJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mG-8V5uz01Dcn5scJbqM2cwduTrnrfmnj-Arbyz9P9c=&emci=78208bb2-9b2a-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=4f7efbed-a72a-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=13640636)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37432132/311034921/7916453?refcode=fl_email_pt_20211011idp_lb_active_xx_btn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI3NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZjdlZmJlZC1hNzJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mG-8V5uz01Dcn5scJbqM2cwduTrnrfmnj-Arbyz9P9c=&emci=78208bb2-9b2a-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=4f7efbed-a72a-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=13640636)
---
We can do more to honor the joy and resilience of Indigenous Peoples, and committing a day to celebrate their heritage is one small way to forge a brighter future for everyone.

clean_body: | = Friend, today is Indigenous Peoples' Day. Today is a day for acknowledging that Native Americans are the first inhabitants of this land, appreciating the countless contributions Indigenous people have made to our state and country, and raising their stories as we learn the history of our nation. Montana is home to seven reservations and twelve tribal nations: Assiniboine, Blackfeet, Chippewa, Cree, Crow, Gros Ventre, Kootenai, Little Shell Chippewa, Northern Cheyenne, Pend d'Oreille, Salish and Sioux. Our state is also home to numerous Native Americans of other tribes who keep their heritage alive. We recommit ourselves to standing side-by-side with Native Americans and advocating for their rights, from being a partner in shining a light on the missing and murdered Indigenous people epidemic, to pushing back on voter suppression efforts aimed at silencing Native American voices. On Friday, President Biden signed the first proclamation to observe Indigenous Peoples’ Day today, but in order to ensure the significance of the day is celebrated every year, we need Congress to act. | We can do more to honor the joy and resilience of Indigenous Peoples, and committing a day to celebrate their heritage is one small way to forge a brighter future for everyone. Thank you, Laurie | Paid for by Laurie Bishop for Montana Laurie Bishop for Montana PO Box 2188 Livingston, MT 59047 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Never Again PAC
subject: Ending Republicans' anti-LGBTQ+ agenda
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC
body:
Today is National Coming Out Day -- a time to celebrate members of the LGBTQ+ community's deeply personal decision to come out and live as their authentic self. But it's also a time to recognize how far we still have to go for equality. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37435093/311039992/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5Mzk3NzQ5LWFjMmEtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=eUAarSwuj_kxXgezdOB027gWrG0FPrbXGlhkimGTn6A=&emci=2ec0d3ce-5d28-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=99397749-ac2a-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=16335001) Team,

Today is National Coming Out Day -- a time to celebrate members of the LGBTQ+ community's deeply personal decision to come out and live as their authentic self. But it's also a time to recognize how far we still have to go for equality.

Right now in Congress, members of the Republican party are continuing to push their hateful, anti-LGBTQ+ agenda. Earlier this year, Democrats in the House passed the Equality Act to ban discrimination based on sexual orientation or gender identity. But nearly every Republican (206 to be exact) voted against this bill.

Some of the 'no' votes included Treason Caucus members Rep. Lauren Boebert who made despicable transphobic remarks when arguing why the bill shouldn't pass and Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, who hung a transphobic sign outside of her office.

It's difficult to make progress for the LGBTQ+ community when we allow homophobic and transphobic members to remain in positions of power. That's why we're committed to ending Republicans' anti-LGBTQ+ agenda and electing leaders who will stand up for equality.

**[Are you with us? clean_body: Today is National Coming Out Day -- a time to celebrate members of the LGBTQ+ community's deeply personal decision to come out and live as their authentic self. But it's also a time to recognize how far we still have to go for equality. Team, Today is National Coming Out Day -- a time to celebrate members of the LGBTQ+ community's deeply personal decision to come out and live as their authentic self. But it's also a time to recognize how far we still have to go for equality. Right now in Congress, members of the Republican party are continuing to push their hateful, anti-LGBTQ+ agenda. Earlier this year, Democrats in the House passed the Equality Act to ban discrimination based on sexual orientation or gender identity. But nearly every Republican (206 to be exact) voted against this bill. Some of the 'no' votes included Treason Caucus members Rep. Lauren Boebert who made despicable transphobic remarks when arguing why the bill shouldn't pass and Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene, who hung a transphobic sign outside of her office. It's difficult to make progress for the LGBTQ+ community when we allow homophobic and transphobic members to remain in positions of power. That's why we're committed to ending Republicans' anti-LGBTQ+ agenda and electing leaders who will stand up for equality. | Thanks, Never Again PAC PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC Never Again PAC PO Box 2153 Purcellville, VA 20134 United States

name: Pro Life Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nati
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2ze747nkvno8m077aj9birglvinl4hffn0nao3vjo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjhm1o37c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zns4jfli1vidfpujbr8qg1l68rhr9837v2bkfelg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjhm1o37c1h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zbug00f0b5poq3a5pm9kg6hsrlo6nu0kaq700aqg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjhm1o37c1h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for Pro Life Update, [please use this preferences page](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/prefs/9z2zu8v9faer14o5ac8k54d530c77joo8na0gg0mc5g).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zib86psp6jl6eposgjokd605uqojkeird3lvjqag_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjhm1o37c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Dr. Jason Martin
subject: This was a tough email to write
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee
body:
Here in Tennessee, COVID-19 isn’t the only pervasive danger to public health. We have an epidemic of gun violence. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37436285/311047877/862036749?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211011gunviolence_JM_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDY3MjMzOC1iNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uqsQOVfreuhp2GxZ3-kyp41n9pkWeAQgUM1_7nfkDyo=)
---
Hey Peter. Here in Tennessee, COVID-19 isn’t the only pervasive danger to public health. We have an epidemic of gun violence. Just last week, children — _children_ — were placed in harm's way when a student brought a gun to the Cummings K-8 school in South Memphis and opened fire. Luckily and by the grace of God, no one was killed. One student was injured, and they’re expected to make a full recovery But the chief medical officer at the LeBonheur Children’s Hospital, where the injured student was treated, said that this was only one of the more than one hundred children that have been treated for gunshot wounds this year. **That is appalling. And worse, Governor Bill Lee refuses to do anything about it.[_I’m running for governor because we have got to protect Tennesseans — especially our children — from gun violence. Will you make a contribution now to help me address the gun violence epidemic in our state?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37436286/311047878/862036749?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211011gunviolence_JM_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDY3MjMzOC1iNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uqsQOVfreuhp2GxZ3-kyp41n9pkWeAQgUM1_7nfkDyo=)** If I'm being completely honest, this is a tough topic for me to fundraise around. But then I think about my three daughters; I think about the fact that **Bill Lee signed a permitless carry bill into law earlier this year** ; I think about the devastation that some families have already experienced as a result of Lee’s callousness, and I know that I have to do everything I can to make sure that no one else goes through that. **Here’s the truth:** Platitudes are not enough. Thoughts and prayers are not enough. Business as usual is absolutely not enough. It has to change and we have to do better. **Tennesseans in every corner of the state are counting on this campaign to deliver real action to save lives.** That’s why I’m still asking for your support and donations here: I don’t see any other choice. We have to get Bill Lee out of the governorship, and elect someone who will lead with compassion, empathy, and courage. clean_body: Here in Tennessee, COVID-19 isn’t the only pervasive danger to public health. We have an epidemic of gun violence. | = Hey Peter. Here in Tennessee, COVID-19 isn’t the only pervasive danger to public health. We have an epidemic of gun violence. Just last week, children — children — were placed in harm's way when a student brought a gun to the Cummings K-8 school in South Memphis and opened fire. Luckily and by the grace of God, no one was killed. One student was injured, and they’re expected to make a full recovery But the chief medical officer at the LeBonheur Children’s Hospital, where the injured student was treated, said that this was only one of the more than one hundred children that have been treated for gunshot wounds this year. That is appalling. And worse, Governor Bill Lee refuses to do anything about it.= If I'm being completely honest, this is a tough topic for me to fundraise around. But then I think about my three daughters; I think about the fact that Bill Lee signed a permitless carry bill into law earlier this year ; I think about the devastation that some families have already experienced as a result of Lee’s callousness, and I know that I have to do everything I can to make sure that no one else goes through that. Here’s the truth: Platitudes are not enough. Thoughts and prayers are not enough. Business as usual is absolutely not enough. It has to change and we have to do better. Tennesseans in every corner of the state are counting on this campaign to deliver real action to save lives. That’s why I’m still asking for your support and donations here: I don’t see any other choice. We have to get Bill Lee out of the governorship, and elect someone who will lead with compassion, empathy, and courage. = = | = Thanks for reading. Dr. Martin | Paid for by Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee Dr. Jason Martin for Tennessee 1831 12th Avenue S #175 Nashville, TN 37203 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

As your Congressman, he’ll fight for the issues that matter most to Floridians: good paying jobs, affordable health care, fighting the climate crisis, and defending our democracy.[_**Chip in now to help Eddie's campaign flip FL-15 blue!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37436302/311048004/810955667?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211011babyteeth_EG_all_xx_topper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGY5MTc1NS1iNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eZrPHQWkJjNPZ2mloWSXVlBfQpzx3M_jReRrmVzedCg=)_ | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37436303/311048005/810955667?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211011babyteeth_EG_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGY5MTc1NS1iNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eZrPHQWkJjNPZ2mloWSXVlBfQpzx3M_jReRrmVzedCg=)

I'm going to tell you a little secret, friends.
I still have my baby teeth.
Okay, it’s just _two_ baby teeth, but now I have your attention. Luckily for me, I have good dental insurance that will cover any issues that arise if/when my baby teeth fall out or, I think, get dislodged? Unclear what the process is but that’s not important.
What _is_ important is that 82 million Americans are expected to be without dental coverage this year. It’s one of those not-super-sexy-but-absolutely-super-important issues that we’ve got to fix, because oral hygiene is often an indicator of deeper health issues (I sound like my dentist now but it’s true!).
[_**Every American should have access not only to affordable dental insurance, but vision, hearing, and, obviously, full medical coverage. Help send me to Congress so we can make that a reality!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37436304/311048006/810955667?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211011babyteeth_EG_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGY5MTc1NS1iNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eZrPHQWkJjNPZ2mloWSXVlBfQpzx3M_jReRrmVzedCg=)
Unfortunately and unsurprisingly, the American Dental Association is doing everything in their power to stop Democrats from expanding Medicare dental coverage in the Build Back Better plan.
As things currently stand, Medicare dental coverage is _extremely_ limited. Including dental, vision and hearing benefits in Medicare will provide needed care to the 60 million older and disabled Americans who otherwise might not afford it.
**Expanded medical benefits should be easy for anyone to get behind, but goes to show just how messed up our system is when lobbyists and special interest groups have as much power as they do.**
One thing is for sure — Eddie Geller will not be bought by those special interest groups. [_**I’m running for Congress to help people, and you better believe that includes providing affordable accessible health, dental, vision, and hearing benefits to every American. Chip in a buck to two to help us do it!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37436305/311048007/810955667?refcode=fl_em_fr_20211011babyteeth_EG_all_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGY5MTc1NS1iNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eZrPHQWkJjNPZ2mloWSXVlBfQpzx3M_jReRrmVzedCg=)

name: Mark Kelly
subject: Please give me a chance to explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37436830/311050249/1927938479?refcode=20211011_MK_split&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Y2YxYmNhNS1iNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XzPhWlXoECliSFR6gAWetFzFG2rHcCcLM76aFRcb4MI=)
Friends — I have an important ask to make, and Seth Moulton said I could reach out to you as one of their top supporters. I hope you’ll give me a minute to explain why this is so important. **One Nation, a National Republican Super PAC, dropped another $1 MILLION on ads attacking me. It’s the latest sign they aren’t slowing down their spending against us heading into 2022.** We need your help to keep up the momentum in the face of this attack, and it’s going to take lots of people making donations of $3, $5, or $10 to get us to our 100,000 contribution goal. That is why I need your support today. Our opponents may have deep pockets, but we have something better — a team of people who I know will always have my back. And if we can hit our 100,000 contribution goal, it’ll show that this team is more determined than ever to defend this seat. You can see how important this is, which is why I have to ask: [**If you are able, will you split a $25 donation between our people-powered campaign and Seth Moulton? It is not too late to get involved!

** WAYS TO GET INVOLVED IN TAKING BACK OUR COUNTRY.
------------------------------------------------------------

First, THANK You for your help with the Melissa Martz Campaign. WE are making a difference and it is beautiful to see the many patriots banning together to secure the future of this nation for our children and grandchildren. *They are why we fight so hard*

RECAP for involvement:

1. Collect Candidate petition forms to get Melissa Martz on the ballot. (forms and materials provided)

2. Volunteer for gun shows. (stipend for lunch provided)

3. Make phone calls or walk to let the people know about the campaign and that they can schedule a meet and greet at melissamartz.com (call lists and walk lists provided)

4. Fundraise/ send fundraiser emails (email list and script provided)
** People can donate money or pay for advertising materials directly or take a car magnet for the campaign.

5. Social Media help.

If you feel moved to help out in any of these ways and have not already signed up ----Please get in touch @ info@melissamartz.com

name: Nikki Fried
subject: 🐌 Major Breaking News 🐌
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
Dear Friends,

You probably didn’t hear about it, but last week, the Florida Department of Agriculture announced that we have officially eliminated the Giant African Land Snail from the State of Florida!

This doesn’t sound like major news. Most people won’t notice. But this pineapple-sized snail can eat through stucco, spread meningitis, and disrupt entire ecosystems.

I’m excited about this successful effort to remove an invasive species not because I’m going to get on cable news for it (I’m not!), but because I knew it was the right thing to do.

That’s the difference between public service and politics. Our elected officials shouldn’t prioritize flashy, hot button issues and overlook the problems that are not as newsworthy.

I’ve spent my tenure as Commissioner of Agriculture and Consumer Services making policy changes that don’t always make news, but do make a difference in people’s lives.

That’s the type of Governor I’ll be - one who does what’s right, whether I get the credit or not.

If you want to prioritize progress over politics, please click here to make an $8 grassroots contribution.

Thank you for your support,

Nikki

Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
Nikki Fried for Governor
6619 S Dixie Hwy
No. 148
Miami, FL 33143
United States

clean_body: Dear Friends, You probably didn’t hear about it, but last week, the Florida Department of Agriculture announced that we have officially eliminated the Giant African Land Snail from the State of Florida! This doesn’t sound like major news. Most people won’t notice. But this pineapple-sized snail can eat through stucco, spread meningitis, and disrupt entire ecosystems. I’m excited about this successful effort to remove an invasive species not because I’m going to get on cable news for it (I’m not!), but because I knew it was the right thing to do. That’s the difference between public service and politics. Our elected officials shouldn’t prioritize flashy, hot button issues and overlook the problems that are not as newsworthy. I’ve spent my tenure as Commissioner of Agriculture and Consumer Services making policy changes that don’t always make news, but do make a difference in people’s lives. That’s the type of Governor I’ll be - one who does what’s right, whether I get the credit or not. If you want to prioritize progress over politics, please click here to make an $8 grassroots contribution. Thank you for your support, Nikki Political advertisement paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor Nikki Fried for Governor 6619 S Dixie Hwy No. 148 Miami, FL 33143 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

subject: re: tomorrow’s deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hala For Virginia P
body:
This election is so important.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37437895/311055619/691946420?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGI0YjJmNC1iYTJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3v_QpwII9hGbl9wTgVYl1577N1ldEFPfsLVcIg8JgZQ=)

Peter, tomorrow marks a turning point in this election!

**Tomorrow, October 12th, is the deadline to register to vote.**

I know you’ve received a lot of emails from me and my team lately — _but this election is that important!_

Let me explain what is on the line on November 2nd:

**The Lt. Governor holds a crucial role in our Democratic majority** — making tie‐breaking decisions. Our current Lt. Governor has cast 52 of these votes!

**Our democracy is facing unprecedented challenges from extreme Republicans.** My opponent seeks to undermine our rights by cutting off abortion access, voting rights, and so much more.

[**So I’m counting on supporters like you, Peter, to help me see this through to the very end. # **Friend — Doc is listening to YOU, not elites and bureaucrats in the Swamp. **

He’s doing exactly what he said he’d do in the U.S. Senate: Delivering for Kansans and Americans, defending our values, and standing strong against the woke left’s push to transform our country.

name: Team Cammack
subject: The American people cannot afford Biden’s spending spree.
body:
President Biden’s $3.5 trillion spending bill is a debt whale that will sink America.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oMN6DMZ2uLF4kyH2ZZTgQ0YMaVW8OQxT2DzvxaHjj2Ku06usX0ZdybWTadu524VAM0USt_XbYoIIn2HdQLcva5FP0UrABpuYhqozHk78Xt-4tI2LA4B9hMBZ3RB6m24v17QmU7RaD6S93ZtTPmfUUlj_ndTEJn-lnvT5GXby9JC_jZDhqa6x9vY6H-mqZ9Vm&c=BG3h08WOZV6ZWfZfllgx1Ao-y9gNHlGomXrFQUIakgX_i3PZeFOj5Q==&ch=PPo2E7n4F980tMx6KpfMHRYckT7N--630V7vruSQVfwom3JQIVrymg==)
---
| Friend,
President Biden's $3.5 trillion spending bill is a debt whale that will sink America. He promised that his spending bill would not damage the economy and there would be no tax hikes on working Americans. He even claimed the bill would "cost zero."

name: Trump News HQ
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuvo2mc872vfcj4nm9di177iq09kqe1h86j0voj0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjjmaoj2c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4b2idra0l4rgb067c148t66bdtm0dlf4s8aq25o_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjjmaoj2c9h2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztkmepcheom5tdcom1evrp8033et79h9647n50e0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjjmaoj2c9h2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

name: Jake Evans
subject: Reminder: A New Generation of Bold Conservative Trailblazers
body:
Last night I had the honor to speak to one of the largest College...
---
| | | | | |
---
| | Dear Friend,
This week I had the honor to speak to one of the largest College Republican chapters in the country, the University of Georgia College Republicans.
---
---
I told these great young patriots that there's no room for weak-kneed, self-interested politicians in the Republican Party. It's time for a new generation of bold conservative trailblazers to retake America from the liberal DC swamp and return it to the people.
---
---
---
Our America First message is resonating with those young and old and our campaign is rapidly building momentum to take back Georgia's 6th District from the radical left.

Last month, a near-total ban on abortion went into effect in Texas.

The anti-choice conservative Republicans thought the pushback would only last a few days or weeks, but they were wrong.

Since then, grassroots supporters from across the country have banded together to show that you will not stand for such a vile attack on women’s rights. Early this month, activists marched in opposition to anti-choice legislation across the country, and the legal battles for our rights have already begun.

**As far-right lawmakers across the nation wage an all-out assault against reproductive rights, I proudly voted to defend every woman’s basic health freedoms.**

With the Women’s Health Protection Act, Congress is taking a critical step to combat these dangerous attacks by enshrining the constitutional protections of Roe v. Wade into law. The facts are clear: the American people overwhelmingly support access to safe, affordable reproductive care for all – and I am proud to stand with them in this fight.

**[But we’ve got to keep the pressure on. The facts are clear: the American people overwhelmingly support access to safe, affordable reproductive care for all – and I am proud to stand with them in this fight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | **= | | = | = | | = | = | | = I’m counting on you to step up for the rights of women across the country, LBR Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester is a Democrat representing the First State, Delaware. She served as the National Co-Chair of the Biden-Harris campaign and Co-Chair of the DCCC ‘Red to Blue’ program. Lisa is running for reelection to continue fighting for our health care, leading the charge toward environmental justice, and advocating for working families like hers. = Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress PO BOX 9767 Wilmington, DE 19810 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. **

name: Dr. Yadira Caraveo
subject: Honoring and celebrating Native American peoples
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
And working together to build a more inclusive and just society. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37439788/311065402/1561815853?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGRjMDU2Yi1jNTJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9upZyh6n1fgBun0sWxEQDRJMmOguFkVkdqq2Rw2JzfY=&emci=a34082fd-8228-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=18dc056b-c52a-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=12666102)
---
| | Peter,

Today we celebrate the communities who first called this continent their home. We take time to honor the rich culture and history of all those with historic ties to the Americas and Colorado.

However, we cannot let today pass without remembering the long and painful history of colonialism in our country and right here in Colorado. We will continue to work together to address past injustices and ensure that we include indigenous communities in our efforts to promote economic, racial, and social justice.

Let’s join together as we reflect on our nation’s long mistreatment of Native Americans and our promise to build a more equitable and inclusive society.

Dr. Yadira Caraveo

clean_body: And working together to build a more inclusive and just society. | | Peter, Today we celebrate the communities who first called this continent their home. We take time to honor the rich culture and history of all those with historic ties to the Americas and Colorado. However, we cannot let today pass without remembering the long and painful history of colonialism in our country and right here in Colorado. We will continue to work together to address past injustices and ensure that we include indigenous communities in our efforts to promote economic, racial, and social justice. Let’s join together as we reflect on our nation’s long mistreatment of Native Americans and our promise to build a more equitable and inclusive society. Happy Indigenous People's Day, friend.

**Today, we celebrate the rich history and culture of indigenous people in the United States.** Long before this land was colonized, it was home to a diverse group of people with a powerful connection to the earth. Many of these tribes are continued today — Arizona is better for having 22 sovereign indigenous communities in our state.

Of course, we cannot celebrate the cultural, spiritual, and historical contributions of indigenous people without also recognizing how our current system has failed them. In 2017, Arizona had the _third-highest number_ of missing and murdered indigenous women and girls in the country.

This cannot continue**.**

As Attorney General, I will fight for justice for missing and murdered indigenous women where previous administrations have failed. **We MUST do better for indigenous people in Arizona.**

[**If you support me in this fight, consider chipping in $5 to my campaign now >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37440399/311068561/2127152568?refcode=X_101121_IndigenousPeoplesDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWRkZWM5Yi1jOTJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ll3jjWZFbyiwQxRE2lbREej6lN7gmOeFBi9YeY43tBE=)

Thank you!

_\-- Diego_ | **Rep. Diego Rodriguez is running for Attorney General to be the People's Attorney, focused on our needs instead of partisan stunts. As a lifelong Democrat, a prosecutor, a defense attorney, and now as a State Representative, Diego is the most experienced and most qualified candidate that we can trust to fight for our rights.**

[**Will you join Team Diego by chipping in a few dollars now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37440403/311068567/2127152568?refcode=X_101121_IndigenousPeoplesDay&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMWRkZWM5Yi1jOTJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ll3jjWZFbyiwQxRE2lbREej6lN7gmOeFBi9YeY43tBE=)

name: Ed Humphreys
subject: Communism and its Creator
disclaimer_text: paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNzk0MjM5MzQ0ODQ0NzQxMjM1JmM9bjB3MyZlPTAmYj03NTI4OTk2NjQmZD1qOHkzbDRq.oM6comTfZuPJYUEp52x5j__0-5O39oppVj5WVcQoe_o)
| | |
---
|
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Communism and its Creator
---
---
| |
---
| |
---
Communist Manifesto author Karl Marx wrote poetry before he published the Manifesto that would later “haunt Europe” and the world. It is in these poems where we learn the intentions of Marx. Here are three small pieces of his poetry to consider. “Till heart’s bewitched, till senses reel:_**
With Satan I have struck my deal.**_
He chalks the signs, beats time for me,
I play the death march fast and free.” “So a god has snatched from me my all
In the curse and rack of Destiny.
All his worlds are gone beyond recall!
Nothing but revenge is left to me!_
On myself revenge I’ll proudly wreak,
On that being, that enthroned Lord,_
“I shall build my throne high overhead,
Cold, tremendous shall its summit be.
For its bulwark-- superstitious dread,
For its Marshall--blackest agony.
Who looks on it with a healthy eye,
Shall turn back, struck deathly pale and dumb” It is clear **we are in a battle of good against evil**. In this fight for the soul of America everyone must have an accurate understanding of the terrain if we are to win our struggle. The source of the evil hanging over America can be traced to these dark passages. I boldly declare that this isn’t about politics or parties but rather a spiritual battle. This is bigger than Republican vs. Democrat. The problem plaguing us infects both parties in different ways. _I believe we can purge it if we commit to do doing so. _ **Now it is our time.** Our time to promote American values. Our time to stand tall for the traditional family. Our time to uphold the timeless principles which made America the greatest nation on Earth. It is incumbent upon us to hold this beachhead, the last foxhole for the American Dream, _Idaho_.
---
| |
---
| Ed's Principle Based Plans for Idaho are available now on the website. | | | [The Plan](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNzk0MjM5MzQ0ODQ0NzQxMjM1JmM9bjB3MyZlPTAmYj03NTI4OTk2NzAmZD1vNGsxZzJx.oUkw1Gm8CWfr4e2z267p5gj9XkTMz2iYCBEL1-ga_n8)
---
We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, _growth in the size of government_. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us. It’s time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are **timeless principles** that produce natural consequences. It’s time to put **principles** above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. Here are just a few that are particularly relevant this week.
---
| | | | [Refugee Resettlement](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNzk0MjM5MzQ0ODQ0NzQxMjM1JmM9bjB3MyZlPTAmYj03NTI4OTk2NzMmZD1jNXQwazF5.g4hDN3pLU3dJ9ReYQsHXVa5jjw3HzlbINRBOy1kmyUY)
---|---|---
A moratorium on refugee resettlement is imperative.
| | [Medical Freedom](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNzk0MjM5MzQ0ODQ0NzQxMjM1JmM9bjB3MyZlPTAmYj03NTI4OTk2NzYmZD14NWk3bzho.3Y5LXY74E4bpUl6hmRyj_pD-qlzLA5520xK20TxB58E)
---|---|---
Make no mistake, the aim of collective good is collective control.
---
| | | | [Housing Price Crisis](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNzk0MjM5MzQ0ODQ0NzQxMjM1JmM9bjB3MyZlPTAmYj03NTI4OTk2NzkmZD1hOXk2ZDNm.1r9GfYkU53Rzh7TvUglWk5ALH8PpTlsJkU3u73_cyrQ)
---|---|---
Ed will avoid quick fixes and offer solid, long-term solutions to ease Idaho's housing price crisis.
| | [Taxpayer Bill of Rights](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNzk0MjM5MzQ0ODQ0NzQxMjM1JmM9bjB3MyZlPTAmYj03NTI4OTk2ODImZD1uNmoxcDFp.XuNsyIEZPS89eSYLpJG0-OQHKCzv3b2T6DnCVrAbNI8)
---|---|---
Nothing chokes economic growth like taking money out of our pockets and using it to create more bureaucracy.
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Humphreys for Governor
---
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Communism and its Creator | | | | Communist Manifesto author Karl Marx wrote poetry before he published the Manifesto that would later “haunt Europe” and the world. It is in these poems where we learn the intentions of Marx. Here are three small pieces of his poetry to consider. “Till heart’s bewitched, till senses reel: With Satan I have struck my deal. He chalks the signs, beats time for me, I play the death march fast and free.” “So a god has snatched from me my all In the curse and rack of Destiny. All his worlds are gone beyond recall! Nothing but revenge is left to me! On myself revenge I’ll proudly wreak, On that being, that enthroned Lord, “I shall build my throne high overhead, Cold, tremendous shall its summit be. For its bulwark-- superstitious dread, For its Marshall--blackest agony. Who looks on it with a healthy eye, Shall turn back, struck deathly pale and dumb” It is clear we are in a battle of good against evil. In this fight for the soul of America everyone must have an accurate understanding of the terrain if we are to win our struggle. The source of the evil hanging over America can be traced to these dark passages. I boldly declare that this isn’t about politics or parties but rather a spiritual battle. This is bigger than Republican vs. Democrat. The problem plaguing us infects both parties in different ways. I believe we can purge it if we commit to do doing so. Now it is our time. Our time to promote American values. Our time to stand tall for the traditional family. Our time to uphold the timeless principles which made America the greatest nation on Earth. It is incumbent upon us to hold this beachhead, the last foxhole for the American Dream, Idaho. | | | Ed's Principle Based Plans for Idaho are available now on the website. | | | We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets, growth in the size of government. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us. It’s time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It’s time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. Here are just a few that are particularly relevant this week. | | | | ---|---|--- A moratorium on refugee resettlement is imperative. | | ---|---|--- Make no mistake, the aim of collective good is collective control. | | | | ---|---|--- Ed will avoid quick fixes and offer solid, long-term solutions to ease Idaho's housing price crisis. | | ---|---|--- Nothing chokes economic growth like taking money out of our pockets and using it to create more bureaucracy. | | | | | | Humphreys for Governor | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- You received this email because you helped us and should help us more.
