Friend, As Democrats explore ways to drive up our debt and prepare to spend trillions of dollars on liberal wish-list items, Mike has been holding the Biden Administration accountable for their actions at home and abroad. From modernizing our military to keeping the Chinese Communist Party and their threats at bay, Mike is leading on the issues that matter most. Check out all the top headlines below and take this month’s [WATCH] Bottom Line:“ It's the entire diversity, equity and inclusion bureaucracy that is being built within the Pentagon. When we take back the House, we have to dismantle it because it's actually harmful to unit cohesion. The military has to be a pure meritocracy.And if you start to view everything through the prism of race, you're going to start to really screw up our ability to fight and win wars.” Is the Military Becoming too Woke? [READ] Bottom Line:“There is nothing new about this. Under the Trump administration, the Pentagon responded to Iran shooting down an American drone with a cyberstrike. Yet what ultimately reset the escalatory ladder was not a fancy theory of how “effects” in one domain impact another, but rather old-school, kinetic action in the form of a missile strike that killed Maj. Gen. Qasem Soleimani, the commander of Iran’s elite Quds Force.” –– The Washington Post [READ] Bottom Line:“The flights began on October 1 when 38 People’s Liberation Army aircraft flew close to southwest Taiwan before circling back as modern China celebrated the 72nd anniversary of its founding, CBS News reported. Chinese planes flew 39 more sorties the next day and another 16 flights the day after that — all following a similar path. On Monday, the Chinese air force sent 52 aircraft, including three dozen fighter jets and a dozen bombers.” –– National Review [READ] Bottom Line:Gallagher told Fox News in a statement, "Biotechnology is a critical emerging sector that may well define the 21st century economy. We are only just beginning to understand its potential applications, both positive and malign.The Biden Administration must act now before it is too late to ensure that Chinese companies like BGI do not come to dominate this key sector."** –– Fox News [READ] Bottom Line:**“The ISIS-K suicide bomber who killed 13 U.S. service members outside of Hamid Karzai International Airport in August was a prisoner released from Bagram Air Base on Aug. 15 after the Taliban seized control of the facility. Officials confirmed the details to Fox News...that intelligence sources reported that the suicide bomber was one of the 7,000 prisoners housed at Bagram prison, and released by the Taliban last month.” –– Fox News Thank you for reading this month’s edition of the Foreign Policy Newsletter –– we’ll be in touch soon as we monitor developing stories from around the globe. Gallagher Foreign Policy HQ | | | | Paid for by Mike Gallagher for Wisconsin | | P.O. BOX 1027 - GREEN BAY, WI 54305 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Ben Shapiro
subject: The Violent College Left
body:
Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, bec
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze2kubd34p42efh61jvsn5kioacvpgqld7d63iug_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge4ob6cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s3i6mp67d3gc5or2o71mhgebd3k6poncchkcoo62tb365q35db3eljj0ptleorjfkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pb6phimsqj2pti6dj32c5ic8r749fg)
Fellow Patriot, Insidious leftist ideology has taken hold of our educational system. It’s never been more important that we expose it, because the Left has lit an ideological fire, and that fire is now consuming the minds of young Americans, burning itself through the most aspects of American culture and politics. That’s why it’s of utmost importance that I hear back from you today. I’m no stranger to the authoritarian attitudes on campus; I famously felt the brunt of it when conservative students invited me to speak on the University of California, Berkeley campus. [**HELP US FIGHT THE RADICAL LEFT**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z1t58akcfstefr8ohtm5v1ebap9ijnph61pjfai8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge4ob6cdh2bs) Radical leftist groups like Antifa vowed to riot and cause harm to others. The fear of violence from leftist agitators was so great that:
* It cost $600,000 in security expenses and required hundreds of policemen to ensure that agitators didn’t disrupt or try to cause violence at my speech.
* The University shut down six buildings on campus during my speech and erected concrete barricades (YES, a wall) to secure the Berkeley campus.
* For the first time in 20 years, the City of Berkeley voted to allow the use of pepper spray against violent protesters.
* In the end, police arrested nine leftists for trying to sneak banned weapons into our event—with the likely intent to do harm.

It’s no longer just about the Left trying to suppress your conservative views on campus. It’s about using the threat of violence to silence the conservative values you and I share. Meanwhile, schools roll out the red carpet for leftists like Angela Davis, Bill Ayers, Barack Obama, Bill Clinton, and Bernie Sanders. At Berkeley, taxpayer-funded school administrators tried to derail my event from even taking place. They told me that they didn’t have a lecture hall available, which was a lie. School administrators even cut the venue in half by not allowing students to sit in the balcony—a dirty tactic to minimize attendance. _**The good news is the radical Left’s attempts to silence me completely backfired.**_**** More than 600 students showed up, and we were able to host an engaging and civil event. Then, OVER 10 MILLION PEOPLE watched my speech online (that’s more viewers than any of the major evening newscasts). This victory for the Conservative Movement would have never happened if it weren’t for the **Young America’s Foundation** **(YAF)**. When Berkeley tried to illegally block me from coming to campus, YAF sued the university —**and won.** But the radicals who rioted and tried to incite violence at Berkeley are relentless. Their stranglehold on America’s universities has not yet been broken. **Young America’s Foundation** has been an incredible partner in making sure I am able to share our conservative values with students on campuses across the country. In fact, I speak on campuses **_exclusively_** through YAF because I know YAF has the experience and leadership necessary to run the nation’s leading campus lecture program. Today YAF needs your help. **[Will you contribute $35 today to ensure that YAF can continue to present speakers, including Dr. Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich, Senator Ted Cruz, and many others to high school and college students? Without you, the mission to pass along our conservative values to future generations will stall out.](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z7at8ba535koekaidldddufmi9ebf8bi5i5p61k0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge4ob6cdh2bs)** Let me tell you a little bit more about what YAF does to advance conservative ideas. Speaking to an audience of Young America’s Foundation students, Vice President Mike Pence noted, “Since its founding in 1960, YAF has been a bulwark of American greatness.” YAF valiantly defends the values we share by educating impressionable young people who have been ideologically poisoned by leftist propaganda for decades, by the very teachers and professors they’re told to trust. YAF’s team is the best at what they do. They are _**#1: the LARGEST and MOST effective conservative youth outreach organization in America**._ Here’s why:
* YAF introduces young audiences to the biggest names in the Conservative Movement through their leading campus lecture program. YAF speakers are the most inspiring conservative voices in America, including **Arthur Laffer, Katie Pavlich,** YAF’s Ronald Reagan Presidential Scholar and Vice President **Mike Pence, Dinesh D’Souza, Lila Rose, Steve Forbes,** Lt. Col.**Allen West** , Speaker**Newt Gingrich, Michael Knowles, Dana Loesch, James O’Keefe,** NFL star and Congressman **Burgess Owens, Star Parker,** Fox News’s**Jesse Watters,** and many others.
* YAF teaches **_millions of students_ **across the nation YOUR conservative values through breakthrough conferences, training seminars, and campus activism initiatives and activities. (In fact, YAF is the only Conservative Movement organization that has a full suite of conservative educational programs for high school students!)
* And YAF preserves and protects President Reagan’s ranch in Santa Barbara, California and Boyhood Home in Dixon, Illinois. They saved these national treasures so young people can learn about Ronald Reagan’s lasting accomplishments.

_No other organization reaches conservative students with foundational American ideas on a bigger scale than Young America’s Foundation._ _That’s why I prefer YAF to be my sole sponsor for campus events._ They fight for the right to ensure alternative voices are heard on college campuses. They stop campuses from being turned into Leftist echo chambers. I am glad I have YAF on my side and the side of the students. But YAF can’t do this alone. As the Left continues to stoop to desperate new lows to silence conservatives, it’s become more important than ever that our values are shared with the next generation of thought leaders. We both know that the Left doesn’t want a fair discussion of ideas. But that’s why YAF needs your help today. At any moment, a scheduled event could get shut down by campus radicals or administrators, and the YAF team must be ready to engage them on a moment’s notice. [**Will you contribute $35 or more today so that YAF’s rapid response team will always be ready to leap into action the next time leftists decide to shut down free speech and deprive students of the chance to hear your conservative ideas?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqjrdniejd0mgm43i9jfcnri8trlam6j4onlgd8o_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge4ob6cdh2bs) Friend, a donation of $35 or whatever you choose does more than you know. The impact amplifying conservative voices will have on the future of our country can’t be overstated. I cannot encourage you enough to consider giving to YAF today. Partnering with YAF today is our opportunity to win a generation that values freedom. I can’t think of a better investment. Ronald Reagan stated, “There is no better way to establish hope for the future than to enlighten young minds.” I look forward to hearing back from you. -Ben Ben Shapiro [**Will you support Young America’s Foundation with a contribution of $35, $50, $100, or even $1000 today, to save this generation by presenting conservative ideas to students across the country?**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zetunkhcg64bn1hst8k6s5d3s04dmtv3oliklj30_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge4ob6cdh2bs) [**DONATE**](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zberqmpa7ongolh4shop6ck6lv5ch2cif5ht5650_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge4ob6cdh2bs) [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zqk6uqr6l0f78qjdqf241461t34n0a4v4jgep258_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge4ob6cdh2bs) | | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zdvs4spbaf70t4g2689d9j4kvgqb8gt571dmh6pg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge4ob6cdh2bs) | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z98tg0tjjl0mphj65qpf1q4a6vdoj28t1gqh9dkg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge4ob6cdh2bs) | [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z9hhpcngq18lbcplv6b3f01l5k1tiencc2dv7e30_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge4ob6cdh2bs)
---|---|---
**[www.yaf.org](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zedj96pk7uhtf2abnvdkhjfb9telicpc9dtqmsto_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge4ob6cdh2bs)**

11480 Commerce Park Dr, 6th Floor
Reston, VA 20191-1556

**[Privacy Policy](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpb1hk3vjse2lel7t2fspmraqc4g751olc6ridf0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge4ob6cdh2bs) **
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2zd187mdbcp7k842dhv30v0vpfrc43qbtkjdenlcg).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3r4n9jbguekk17241tkaurokbnpnbnn3o4kjaj8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cpie1oj1cphm49fg)

clean_body: Congratulations! | Peter, On my desk right now is a beautiful list of Top Republicans , and your name is at the very top! That’s why I’m excited to offer you the exclusive opportunity to represent Englewood, FL on the Chairman’s Club \-- a small group of elite supporters that forms the core of my Grassroots Team. I’m holding your spot on this list until 11:59 PM TONIGHT, but then I’m going to need to move on to the next person. | | | | | | Thank you. And congratulations! Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

subject: AP: Iowa's GOP leaders stand by Trump as he repeats false claims
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
Trump is touring the country, repeating his "Big Lie," mobilizing his far-right base. Our opponent Kim Reynolds is with him every step of the way. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37441323/311076300/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmNmMmFlNC1kMDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xne0G6VN_boWdfXFuO6bEQwUW1jRSDxwR39vwq3kwrc=)
**_AP:_ Iowa's GOP leaders stand by Trump as he repeats false claims**
Friend,

Trump was in Iowa this weekend for a major MAGA rally, where he was joined by the Iowa GOP establishment. He repeatedly questioned the 2020 election results and continued to undermine our free and fair elections.

He said the "real insurrection" was in November when Biden won the election -- not January 6th, when a far-right mob attacked the US Capitol causing millions of dollars in damage, injuring 140 police officers, and ultimately leading to the death of five people.

**Our opponent Kim Reynolds is with him every step of the way.**

Iowans deserve better. Ras is focused on dialing DOWN the hate and fear. He'll do the hard work of bringing Iowans together -- regardless of party -- to find solutions that get us out of this pandemic, ensure we have clean drinking water, invest in public education, and create family-sustaining jobs.

No one person can run for governor alone, which is why we're building the biggest campaign possible, with support from all across Iowa and the country so we can flip Iowa blue. That's where you come in:

[**Can you chip in $3 today to show that Donald Trump and Kim Reynolds' Iowa is not the Iowa we know, and it's certainly not the Iowa we deserve. clean_body: Trump is touring the country, repeating his "Big Lie," mobilizing his far-right base. Our opponent Kim Reynolds is with him every step of the way. | = AP: Iowa's GOP leaders stand by Trump as he repeats false claims Friend, Trump was in Iowa this weekend for a major MAGA rally, where he was joined by the Iowa GOP establishment. He repeatedly questioned the 2020 election results and continued to undermine our free and fair elections. He said the "real insurrection" was in November when Biden won the election -- not January 6th, when a far-right mob attacked the US Capitol causing millions of dollars in damage, injuring 140 police officers, and ultimately leading to the death of five people. Our opponent Kim Reynolds is with him every step of the way. Iowans deserve better. Ras is focused on dialing DOWN the hate and fear. He'll do the hard work of bringing Iowans together -- regardless of party -- to find solutions that get us out of this pandemic, ensure we have clean drinking water, invest in public education, and create family-sustaining jobs. No one person can run for governor alone, which is why we're building the biggest campaign possible, with support from all across Iowa and the country so we can flip Iowa blue. That's where you come in: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = The only way we'll be able to reject Trump and Reynolds' hate and division is by replacing the GOP establishment, up and down the ballot. We can do it, but only if we do it together. Thanks for all you've done to support our campaign thus far, and = Team Ras = | | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. O. name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: A really quick (but really important) question
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This should take you *literally* two seconds...
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20211011-2978-header&t=1&akid=2978%2E434096%2EogVjli)
Hey, Peter — it's Celeste, John Fetterman's Political Director.
I'm running a really quick _(but really important)_ poll of all our supporters on Team Fetterman. So I need to get your answer to this single question:
**Were you aware that CNN has ranked our race here in Pennsylvania as the #1 Most Likely to Flip Senate Seat in the entire country?[Let our team know by clicking here, or either of the buttons below:](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-email-cnn-oneclick/?source=em20211011-2978&t=2&akid=2978%2E434096%2EogVjli)**
Were you aware that CNN has ranked our race here in Pennsylvania as the #1 Most Likely to Flip Senate Seat in the entire country? | | [YES](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-email-cnn-oneclick/?source=em20211011-2978&t=3&akid=2978%2E434096%2EogVjli)
---
[NO](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-email-cnn-oneclick/?source=em20211011-2978&t=4&akid=2978%2E434096%2EogVjli)
---
I'm asking because, as Political Director, it's my job to know how many people know these kinds of HUGE news updates about our campaign to elect John Fetterman to fight for us in the U.S. Senate.
**In case you weren't previously aware, CNN has named our race in Pennsylvania as the most likely flip opportunity that Democrats have to win another Senate seat.** That's how important this race will be in 2022 — _and how much of an impact your support right now would have on the future of this country._
[__](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-email-cnn-oneclick/?source=em20211011-2978&t=5&akid=2978%2E434096%2EogVjli)
**[So, Peter, will you help our team collect this super valuable data by filling out our online poll right now? We need as many responses as possible to get a truly representative sample from this team, so your support would be *deeply* appreciated.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/survey/jf-email-cnn-oneclick/?source=em20211011-2978&t=6&akid=2978%2E434096%2EogVjli)**
Thank you — I'll report back to you on the results as soon as we have 'em!
Celeste
Celeste Trusty
Political Director
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Congress needs to right the wrongs of the past.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter --

Today is Indigenous Peoples' Day -- a time when we celebrate and recognize the nearly 600 federally recognized Tribal communities in the United States.

Listening to and working with the sovereign nations in our region is an important part of my job. Just this month, I had the chance to meet with Tribal leaders and the Northwest Indian Fisheries Commission to discuss how the Biden administration can invest in and support Indigenous peoples.

Tribal communities are bearing the brunt of climate change as sea levels rise. I'm proud the House majority passed new federal funding this year for Tribal relocation efforts. I even had the honor of welcoming Secretary of the Interior and the first Native American cabinet secretary, Deb Haaland, to our region to see firsthand the Quinault Indian Nation's Taholah Village Relocation project. And I'm working to secure key funding increases in the federal budget to help recover salmon stocks and support the Tribal fisheries that depend on them.

Washington is home to **29** federally recognized tribes, including 11 right here in the 6th district: Chehalis, Quinault, Hoh, Quileute, Makah, Lower Elwha Klallam Tribe, Jamestown S'Klallam, Port Gamble, Suquamish, Skokomish, and Squaxin Island.

Peter -- each of these nations has their own unique culture, traditions, and stories that add important threads to the fabric of our region and our country. They existed long before Christopher Columbus' voyages. They've withstood horrendous treatment, persecution, and broken promises from our own government.

**I hope you 'll join me in celebrating Indigenous Peoples' Day today. We need to continue calling on Congress to right the wrongs of the past and honor its trust and treaty obligations with Tribal communities.**

It's an honor to serve you,

Derek

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/1wIHhVNRzRdiq0KsV4bUn0oV2VJvOyUhop29vPEK7HM=/wAdxc_5H6bokyDmkW5_6EqgCALBJbobFPkmAFPgR_WE=) | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/1wIHhVNRzRdiq0KsV4bUn0oV2VJvOyUhop29vPEK7HM=/gY4lt9bJ2v4kiYMuAIzviZ9i93WwyylA1sGoV7lQ-7A=)
---|---
Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
---

People for Derek Kilmer
PO Box 1381
Tacoma WA 98402 United States

Peter, thank you so much for being a supporter of Derek Kilmer and Democrats up and down the ballot.

Our digital program helps us reach folks with the latest updates. But, if you'd rather not hear from our team, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/1wIHhVNRzRdiq0KsV4bUn0oV2VJvOyUhop29vPEK7HM=/I-zhvZBXdWgQJ2MFPfIwWZMM0zxAnLfTKT9uIuWuVu4=).

There’s nothing more important to me than my family.

[**_Which is exactly why I’m running for Congress. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37441778/311078282/1129282168?refcode=20211010_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs_v2&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWI0NWMxYS1kNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8AiYlbhvayZmqSh_UkY4z556y7M_ics3ZMt2ioCBV6Y=)

Thank you from the bottom of my heart,

Tony

P.S. I’m forwarding you Lauren’s message, in case you missed it. I hope you can see why this is so important to us.

* * *

[**_I promised my husband, Tony, that I’d lend him a hand today. I’m about to explain why flipping this seat is so important and why I’m confident Tony can pull this off. But if you’re short on time, will you chip in $10 now to support him? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37441803/311078308/1129282168?refcode=20211010_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs_v2&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWI0NWMxYS1kNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8AiYlbhvayZmqSh_UkY4z556y7M_ics3ZMt2ioCBV6Y=)

Since he launched his campaign for Congress, Tony has been working day and night.

— Knocking on doors to meet voters
— Connecting with local businesses and community organizations
— Raising money to keep his campaign running
— _On top of helping me raise our two young kids!_
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37441804/311078309/1129282168?refcode=20211010_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs_v2&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWI0NWMxYS1kNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8AiYlbhvayZmqSh_UkY4z556y7M_ics3ZMt2ioCBV6Y=)
That's just how Tony is.

[**_When Tony believes in something, he doesn’t stop until he gets the job done. And right now, I know in my heart that our neighbors need a fighter like Tony in Congress. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37441806/311078310/1129282168?refcode=20211010_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs_v2&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWI0NWMxYS1kNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8AiYlbhvayZmqSh_UkY4z556y7M_ics3ZMt2ioCBV6Y=)

Like Tony, I’ve dedicated my life to public service.

I started out as a Special Education teacher and decided to go to law school so I could do more to help my students and their families.

Now I run a local non-profit dedicated to helping families with children with disabilities get the support they need to be successful at school.

Tony and I are both driven by a mission to help others, in whatever way we can.

That’s the kind of representation that our neighbors deserve from their Congressman.

Don Bacon has acted against the best interests of our community so many times, with his votes to repeal access to affordable healthcare and cut taxes for billionaires and wealthy corporations.

After Tony’s dad passed away from COVID-19 and Bacon voted against COVID relief when Nebraskans needed it most, [**_I knew that Tony was the right person to replace him._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37441808/311078311/1129282168?refcode=20211010_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs_v2&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWI0NWMxYS1kNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8AiYlbhvayZmqSh_UkY4z556y7M_ics3ZMt2ioCBV6Y=)

[**_Tony has shown us he is the leader that our community and our families need and deserve. But Don Bacon already has over $420,000 lined up to stop Tony from winning. I know if anyone can catch up and flip this seat, it’s Tony -- but only if he can hit his $8,381 goal before his Midnight Deadline. I’m personally asking: will you chip in $10 now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37441810/311078314/1129282168?refcode=20211010_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs_v2&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWI0NWMxYS1kNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8AiYlbhvayZmqSh_UkY4z556y7M_ics3ZMt2ioCBV6Y=)

I know you work hard for your money and I wish I didn’t have to ask.

But if Tony misses his $8,381 goal, he’ll have to make serious budget cuts to his campaign that will hurt his chances of winning.
[**So I’m asking one last time: If you believe in Tony as much as I do, will you chip in $10 now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37441812/311078316/1129282168?refcode=20211010_em_fr_b1_tv_30op_rs_v2&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWI0NWMxYS1kNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8AiYlbhvayZmqSh_UkY4z556y7M_ics3ZMt2ioCBV6Y=)

name: Charles Booker
subject: Indigenous Peoples’ Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Hi Peter,

Today, we honor the Indigenous Peoples who lived here and cared for this
land long before it was "discovered" in 1492. Knowing this true history
helps us all to heal and empowers us to prevent repeating mistakes of the
past.

This weekend, I was in Hopkinsville, Kentucky and had to stop by the Trail
of Tears Commemorative Park. For those of you who don’t know, Hopkinsville
is a significant stop on the Trail of Tears — the route by which 16,000
Native Americans were forcibly removed from their homes in the
Southeastern United States and marched two thousand miles to Oklahoma.
Four thousand people died along the route.

Historic tribes like the Chickasaw, Shawnee, and Cherokee tribes called
Kentucky home before their forced removal. Indigenous Peoples are an
integral part of our Commonwealth’s story — and we must honor that painful
history.

We must also continue fighting for justice for Indigenous Peoples in our
nation. They deserve our full commitment to truth, equity, and humanity.

From the hood to the holler — we’re building a coalition that includes
everyone. That’s how we’re going to create a movement that represents all
of us.

I hope you’ll join me in taking some time out of your day to learn more,
celebrate, and honor Indigenous people and their stories, contributions,
and histories.

— Charles

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211011-1050-footer&t=1001&refcode2=1050_346206_XbDuZ9&akid=1050%2E346206%2EXbDuZ9

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1050%2E346206%2EXbDuZ9

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, OCTOBER 11, 2021 MEAGAN HANSON CALLS ON MCBATH TO TAKE CONGRESSIONAL ACTION, INVESTIGATE FULTON COUNTY BOARD OF ELECTIONS ATLANTA - Today, Meagan Hanson, conservative candidate running to unseat liberal Democrat Lucy McBath in Georgia's 6th Congressional District, called for McBath to launch a congressional investigation after two Fulton County employees were fired this afternoon for [shredding voter registration applications](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GFabQW2BOCDGdyLY6EeWTsr2LdS8r92KGUTcAK0dbAYwAbEHOk4Z640Tf2wLjdN-ti18AtYVdVYc3AKEYrHdMZA_UEwDuRce6OQYJuX2k6taRYHD3YeGwnXeWNs6C4a3ua59fQHv-SiHmnl3kvRZe_JgHREm7rha8WaambYtUm1htyWoo4h5v1dL95nOnT22UxqoI8xkVEcM0f0cGk-m5hQ98xamtRVioGoXqSg7WHZjph1F_36M9VOelfU_pofCMVOuC2GPZ93AtSXOFTP0fYQT6yHTV1TB7Wm08OWY1nADUFeVZEVpj5zg7ThhBvOmxGsIjwRqSYX436i1rFWnTo5PwDbXyP9y&c=lYceAYwaUUL5sWAGqS0CHykXJIx57-SV9qRy_bRwdp5cOY-Ac-JV0w==&ch=kR4OKWxb2TIibWscvrnn6UKfiSWWvhjO5T7pkHniLbzjcBe98SscHQ==). McBath has yet to take action against Fulton County's Democrat-controlled elections board despite its long history of flawed election oversight, even after the county [double counted more than 200 ballots](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001GFabQW2BOCDGdyLY6EeWTsr2LdS8r92KGUTcAK0dbAYwAbEHOk4Z640Tf2wLjdN-gr9YrBYMt5xHjVI8DkTF4VQq6GGGxcaThV1vffC4tCXUSURe3kVBQL0UyXFpu51yNp9srfVLnU6zZf1tMnqi6NBQKI6GYFZ-q_ROuo2233ztfiHwUFUpRvJxHZqTNAcphruUihnLYSwQ3qtUPEmxPqPXVkcleDVIktHZVzkY9VB7AoXh58El1y6yvfhqrtyktDRFDae9xETOs1P2kOIAzg==&c=lYceAYwaUUL5sWAGqS0CHykXJIx57-SV9qRy_bRwdp5cOY-Ac-JV0w==&ch=kR4OKWxb2TIibWscvrnn6UKfiSWWvhjO5T7pkHniLbzjcBe98SscHQ==) in the 2020 presidential election. "For years, the voters of Fulton County have heard horror stories about the way our elections are run - from double counted ballots to shredded registration applications," said Hanson. "As one of Fulton County's Congressional Representatives, it's time for Lucy McBath to come out of hiding and work with her colleagues to launch a congressional investigation into Fulton's well-documented record of irregularities and fraud. To do anything less is to disregard Fulton County's incompetence, condone the failed partisans in charge of its election board, and abandon the voters of Congressional District 6." ### Press Contact: media@meaganhanson.com

McBath has yet to take action against Fulton County's Democrat-controlled elections board despite its long history of flawed election oversight, even after the county == in the 2020 presidential election. "For years, the voters of Fulton County have heard horror stories about the way our elections are run - from double counted ballots to shredded registration applications," said Hanson. "As one of Fulton County's Congressional Representatives, it's time for Lucy McBath to come out of hiding and work with her colleagues to launch a congressional investigation into Fulton's well-documented record of irregularities and fraud. To do anything less is to disregard Fulton County's incompetence, condone the failed partisans in charge of its election board, and abandon the voters of Congressional District 6." ### Press Contact: media@meaganhanson.com | | | | == | == P.O. name: Holly McCormack
subject: Indigenous Peoples' Day
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Peter,
I'm Holly McCormack and today I'm announcing my candidacy against Marjorie Taylor Greene for Georgia's 14th Congressional District. We are kicking off our campaign today by reaching out to you because we need your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
I am a mother, small businesswoman, and a community activist. I have lived in this District most of my life and the issues our residents are facing are not addressed with conspiracy theories.
Rush a donation today:
$5.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $50.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $10.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $75.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $25.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $100.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY]Northwest Georgia is currently represented by someone who parachuted into the District just before the election because she thought it would be an easy win. She likes to make noise and fuel hate while ignoring the needs of those who actually live in our District. That is not who we are ! We need someone from our community who knows our struggles and who can stand up for us to get things done in Congress.
We need a leader who has values and empathy for everyone in her District, not just those with the loudest voices. Let's cut through the noise and get to work.
Check out our Website [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/] , Twitter [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] , and Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] . We have a tough road ahead of us but with your help we can fire Marjorie. Donate $50 today and help me take Northwest Georgia back. I couldn’t do it without you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
In solidarity,
Holly McCormack
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] Join the #MackPack [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/] https://www.hollyforcongress.org [https://www.hollyforcongress.org]

Holly McCormack for Congress
862 Lafayette St
PO Box 1035
Ringgold, GA 30736
United States

clean_body: No way! | | | | | | | | | Fellow American, In the last 6 months, we have seen the biggest jump in inflation in more than 30 years. Yet the Democrats believe the more money you throw at a problem, the better it will be in the end. Make no mistake , this enormous spending bill will cause insurmountable debt on not only the American people, but our future generations to come. We cannot afford to let Nancy Pelosi and Bernie Sanders push this radical spending package on the American people, while simultaneously lying that it will cost us $0. Speaker Pelosi and President Biden expect America's future generations to write them a blank check. That's a future for our children and grandchildren that I refuse to let happen. God Bless, Congressman Fred Keller (Taking the values of PA's 12th District to Congress) Paid for by Fred Keller for Congress Our mailing address is: 23 North Derr Drive, Suite 2 Lewisburg, PA 17837 Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

name: Great America Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c489%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=0hdeB8cJxiyeZoEvFuQKeA&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66063%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Be3R2WQlffdKZoadzhddHg&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66064%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KTKHg6R6X9VQQOMqrg%2f11w&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c66064%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KTKHg6R6X9VQQOMqrg%2f11w&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c489%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=0hdeB8cJxiyeZoEvFuQKeA&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c489%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=0hdeB8cJxiyeZoEvFuQKeA&sysid=1)

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: I will nominate Trump as Speaker
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001acxi9tKlhfy6pfudz6eDT4HLdml2OVl_Sa9e2U-PqmzpmpqwQ8a9BlrYCHZYT_6Y-kNNBFmcl4_DR8__fhaz5L45RHRqduThar4lBB2oOFEmrHYmw4PL_VZQIB2dLYPRj2O1w-jINLNX9ED-9Wmb3_O2lYgkeb6JMGBz2cUbftCfJS9lNf1hjhmcSGqac_LT&c=JCGG6dB55xTD5awZfCupgWsEAw4pnAFeJ8DIGk8LigXha7LBma7kUw==&ch=OT5IDYCQmh2y1KB7O_lcFPjpRM-R91ZR5eVXEdrb0rqZWXfEUJ16iw==)
---
| Peter,
---
| Last week, I went on Real America's Voice to talk about Donald Trump's return to politics.
I am so impatient to have Trump back, that I went on and publicly declared that I will nominate Donald Trump as Speaker of the House.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001acxi9tKlhfy6pfudz6eDT4HLdml2OVl_Sa9e2U-PqmzpmpqwQ8a9BlrYCHZYT_6Y-kNNBFmcl4_DR8__fhaz5L45RHRqduThar4lBB2oOFEmrHYmw4PL_VZQIB2dLYPRj2O1w-jINLNX9ED-9Wmb3_O2lYgkeb6JMGBz2cUbftCfJS9lNf1hjhmcSGqac_LT&c=JCGG6dB55xTD5awZfCupgWsEAw4pnAFeJ8DIGk8LigXha7LBma7kUw==&ch=OT5IDYCQmh2y1KB7O_lcFPjpRM-R91ZR5eVXEdrb0rqZWXfEUJ16iw==)
---
| [WATCH THE EXCLUSIVE INTERVIEW >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001acxi9tKlhfy6pfudz6eDT4HLdml2OVl_Sa9e2U-PqmzpmpqwQ8a9BlrYCHZYT_6Y-kNNBFmcl4_DR8__fhaz5L45RHRqduThar4lBB2oOFEmrHYmw4PL_VZQIB2dLYPRj2O1w-jINLNX9ED-9Wmb3_O2lYgkeb6JMGBz2cUbftCfJS9lNf1hjhmcSGqac_LT&c=JCGG6dB55xTD5awZfCupgWsEAw4pnAFeJ8DIGk8LigXha7LBma7kUw==&ch=OT5IDYCQmh2y1KB7O_lcFPjpRM-R91ZR5eVXEdrb0rqZWXfEUJ16iw==)
If Republicans win back the House in 2022, we'll have the chance to remove Nancy Pelosi and vote in a new Speaker...and I intend to bring Trump back early and give him the Speaker's gavel.
Because the Speaker does not need to be a member of Congress, we can nominate Trump and let him continue his America First agenda while presiding over the House.
Because of the RINOs and uninspired leaders of the Establishment Republicans, there will be major pushback to our effort. I need to know I have your support to keep fighting for a return to Donald Trump and America First policies.
[Join the fight for America First >> ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001acxi9tKlhfy6pfudz6eDT4HLdml2OVl_Sa9e2U-PqmzpmpqwQ8a9BlrYCHZYT_6Y-kNNBFmcl4_DR8__fhaz5L45RHRqduThar4lBB2oOFEmrHYmw4PL_VZQIB2dLYPRj2O1w-jINLNX9ED-9Wmb3_O2lYgkeb6JMGBz2cUbftCfJS9lNf1hjhmcSGqac_LT&c=JCGG6dB55xTD5awZfCupgWsEAw4pnAFeJ8DIGk8LigXha7LBma7kUw==&ch=OT5IDYCQmh2y1KB7O_lcFPjpRM-R91ZR5eVXEdrb0rqZWXfEUJ16iw==)
More and more, our country needs an inspired leader - one who will fight for the millions of Americans who feel like their vote was disgraced and their communities are being invaded.
[And the best, most inspired leader of our movement is Donald J. Trump.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001acxi9tKlhfy6pfudz6eDT4HLdml2OVl_Sa9e2U-PqmzpmpqwQ8a9BlrYCHZYT_6Y-kNNBFmcl4_DR8__fhaz5L45RHRqduThar4lBB2oOFEmrHYmw4PL_VZQIB2dLYPRj2O1w-jINLNX9ED-9Wmb3_O2lYgkeb6JMGBz2cUbftCfJS9lNf1hjhmcSGqac_LT&c=JCGG6dB55xTD5awZfCupgWsEAw4pnAFeJ8DIGk8LigXha7LBma7kUw==&ch=OT5IDYCQmh2y1KB7O_lcFPjpRM-R91ZR5eVXEdrb0rqZWXfEUJ16iw==)
We need to stick together on this. The Liz Cheney and Mitt Romney Republicans want a return to the weak and corporate-sellout days of the past - but we can have bold new leadership next year starting with Donald Trump as Speaker of the House.
---
| | | [Support America First >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001acxi9tKlhfy6pfudz6eDT4HLdml2OVl_Sa9e2U-PqmzpmpqwQ8a9BlrYCHZYT_6Y-kNNBFmcl4_DR8__fhaz5L45RHRqduThar4lBB2oOFEmrHYmw4PL_VZQIB2dLYPRj2O1w-jINLNX9ED-9Wmb3_O2lYgkeb6JMGBz2cUbftCfJS9lNf1hjhmcSGqac_LT&c=JCGG6dB55xTD5awZfCupgWsEAw4pnAFeJ8DIGk8LigXha7LBma7kUw==&ch=OT5IDYCQmh2y1KB7O_lcFPjpRM-R91ZR5eVXEdrb0rqZWXfEUJ16iw==)
---
| | | [Save America >>](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001acxi9tKlhfy6pfudz6eDT4HLdml2OVl_Sa9e2U-PqmzpmpqwQ8a9BlrYCHZYT_6Y-kNNBFmcl4_DR8__fhaz5L45RHRqduThar4lBB2oOFEmrHYmw4PL_VZQIB2dLYPRj2O1w-jINLNX9ED-9Wmb3_O2lYgkeb6JMGBz2cUbftCfJS9lNf1hjhmcSGqac_LT&c=JCGG6dB55xTD5awZfCupgWsEAw4pnAFeJ8DIGk8LigXha7LBma7kUw==&ch=OT5IDYCQmh2y1KB7O_lcFPjpRM-R91ZR5eVXEdrb0rqZWXfEUJ16iw==)

| Thank you,

| Matt Gaetz

name: Team Hawley
subject: (1) Unread Message: Biden Deploys FBI To Silence Parents
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley for Senate
body:
I'm Fighting Back [](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=98ea735f5814455a95e7bf6a1bb3f035&_e=iFY835hnwsv4vXbTOxMYR1DZlrz48jdYfTYlNTQdDciwrwNeHn6fMA-CdthZOAVCDcMbGe15JRngAN2QlQ9SgHkBm5SFkSx9r2MkfFEEK7_00zx4gGwiIfSJvp8KjuJeijFoyIme3dq9jfoLllZBeqqc_dc_07MoKKwifq0nN1w8FefdSNtKJZYF3GdVJNtKePqL2XstWTF-B29LsivhN5U_M4XafXqVF21bhhRUXm6PZObG-eZttzgdWz6BSM-zyxWGFB_CtQRASEsY-H_pm9NjqazxsN_KBMKO938661fVO_sh2Sgv6m6AYMsgW2_Qx9Njq1Ess5L5VNvAiXAbSK9uMZlxOZhb84ro3bV9dp6M1FhxZ346EGsspgpBOSFlYDciYpH3Yx_h6JeueB56xN4Uo1aiZn9sEO-wmhTkL7Q%3D) | |
---
Peter,
Joe Biden will stop at nothing to ensure Critical Race Theory is pushed in public schools. Instead of listening to the nationwide outcry of parents, Biden has kowtowed to the woke left mob and deployed the FBI to investigate parents who question school boards as domestic terrorists!

This is wrong and unprecedented! Biden knows better, or at least he ought to. Having been a politician for nearly fifty years, Biden knows better than to treat the FBI as his own political police force, investigating those who have ideological differences.

clean_body: | | | = | | Derek, whenever Glenn Youngkin’s rhetoric intrudes on my screen, I have no words — and that is unusual for me. He’s bragging about being endorsed by Donald Trump. He’s advocating for another four years of Trump as president. He’s announcing he’ll go "on offense" to ban abortion care. And he’s spouting baseless, dangerous lies about the 2020 election. I was shocked to learn that this despicable individual is running so many ads that he’s TIED with Terry McAuliffe in the race to be Virginia’s next Governor. = | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = You know what else was shocking to me, Derek? I hear some people saying that Democrats aren’t enthusiastic this year. That can’t be true! Last year, I worked my heart out alongside you and millions of other Americans to vote Donald Trump out, and together, we were successful by a wide margin. This year, with our constitutional democracy at stake — this is not an exaggeration — and so many values that we have in common STILL under threat, we cannot afford to be complacent or discouraged. Will you join me in staying active in the fight to extinguish Trumpism in America? Okay! The first major battle is the governor’s race in Virginia. We HAVE to make sure that Terry McAuliffe defeats his openly Trumpist opponent in November 2021 by a majority too big to ignore, suppress or dispute. = | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you for being such an important part of this campaign. Your contribution really does matter. Wishing you and your family all the best in these challenging times, – Carole = Carole King is a singer-songwriter, author, and activist. Her distinctions include a Grammy Lifetime Achievement Award and a Kennedy Center honor. Now Carole is using her platform to help Terry McAuliffe win in Virginia — and she actually did write this email. = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 26112 Arlington, VA 22215 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. name: James Hartnett
subject: 📈 Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Hey Team!
It is OFFICIALLY autumn 🍂 and as the weather gets cooler, I wanted to let you know that our campaign is only going to get hotter. I also wanted to give you an update on how things are going with the campaign since our last goal.
In short: we’re full speed ahead and building the momentum to power through the colder months. With the nice weather, Stewart has been out into the community meeting voters, kicking off canvasses, and running digital ads.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2110-q4-sn-100?refcode=211011-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2110-q4-sn-100?refcode=211011-email]
The weeks ahead are jam-packed with meet & greets, Democratic club events, and so much more!
We want to make sure we’re staying ahead of our October fundraising, and since this is the spookiest month of the year, I wanted to ask if I can count on you to chip in $10 to Stewart’s campaign today so we can be prepared for any shocks or scares that come our way. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2110-q4-sn-100?refcode=211011-email&amount=10]
We all know that Stewart’s laser-focused on improving access to healthcare, cleaning up our rivers and the Chesapeake Bay, and protecting the right to vote. But this is the time when we need to work even harder.
So I’m asking for 100 people to step up by the end of the day today! You can chip in using this link I’ll leave for you here: http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2110-q4-sn-100?refcode=211011-email [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2110-q4-sn-100?refcode=211011-email]
Thanks everyone,
James
Stewart Navarre is a Democrat running for Virginia's 1st Congressional District. He's ready to serve his fellow Virginians with integrity, ethics, and hard work. Support Stewart with a donation today.
CONTRIBUTE >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2110-q4-sn-100?refcode=211011-email] CONTRIBUTE $25 MONTHLY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2110-q4-sn-100?refcode=211011-email&amount=25&recurring=true]PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
Stewart Navarre for Congress
PO Box 150
Fredericksburg, VA 22404
United States

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for the week of October 11th: Stop Lucy Koh – America’s worst Covid judge!
body:
| |
---
**Action items for this week include:**
* Stop the worst “Covid judge” in America
* Reminders and other sign up forms

See below for details!

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
President Biden's Department of Justice is [engaging in a bizarre effort](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjg0LTI2OWM1ODhkNTQwYjRmMWFhMGEzYmZiMWFhMGRjMDdk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvbWNjYXJ0aHktY2FsbHMtZG9qLXRhcmdldGluZy1wYXJlbnRzLWF0dGVuZGluZy1zY2hvb2wtYm9hcmQtbWVldGluZ3MtZGlzdHVyYmluZz9taWQ9NDQ0MzImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=-INjA-XdzHe-uGD2Ny9TNg) to harass parents speaking out against critical race theory and pandemic lockdowns in America's public schools. Attorney General Merrick Garland has directed federal officials to work with states on [cracking down](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjg0LTI2OWM1ODhkNTQwYjRmMWFhMGEzYmZiMWFhMGRjMDdk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVzdGljZS5nb3Yvb3BhL3ByL2p1c3RpY2UtZGVwYXJ0bWVudC1hZGRyZXNzZXMtdmlvbGVudC10aHJlYXRzLWFnYWluc3Qtc2Nob29sLW9mZmljaWFscy1hbmQtdGVhY2hlcnM_bWlkPTQ0NDMyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=fEh-bJBVrDslZTy6EI0gVQ) on "harassment, intimidation and threats of violence" against school boards.

This order is an effort to prevent parents from being involved in their children's education and is a terrifying expansion of government power.
|
---
**Stop the worst “Covid judge” in America
**
The Biden administration has nominated Lucy Koh for the 9th circuit, and she must be stopped. She maliciously targeted churches in California, keeping them locked down, even as bars, hair salons, and other businesses were open. She is anti-religious freedom, and has no regard for the Constitution. We do not need yet another crazy, radical judge on the 9th circuit. Please take the following action this week to stop her nominating process.

**For both of your US Senators, please do the following:**
* Call the DC office [(Find your Senators’ numbers here.)](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjg0LTI2OWM1ODhkNTQwYjRmMWFhMGEzYmZiMWFhMGRjMDdk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuc2VuYXRlLmdvdi9zZW5hdG9ycy9zZW5hdG9ycy1jb250YWN0Lmh0bT9taWQ9NDQ0MzImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=aig_hRjxT5J6CrAEj-Pfpg)
* Call one local/state office – to find one of the local office numbers, go to the home page of your Senator’s official government website (through the link above), and they’re usually listed under “offices” or “office locations,” though sometimes you have to go to the “contact” page first.
* **Message:** Oppose the nomination and confirmation of Lucy Koh to the 9th She has proven herself to be an activist and an extremist. She will not faithfully apply the law, as shown by her rulings on churches and lockdowns during Covid. She is anti-First Amendment and you must oppose her advancement.

[**Watch this video of Sen. Ted Cruz questioning Lucy Koh.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjg0LTI2OWM1ODhkNTQwYjRmMWFhMGEzYmZiMWFhMGRjMDdk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cueW91dHViZS5jb20vd2F0Y2g_dj1vTjJhRmpoMFg2MCZtaWQ9NDQ0MzImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=6cGBRDHVbM-ZrnRE5XEEig)****

If your Senator is listed below, when you call, add a “thank you” for asking Koh tough questions during a hearing last week. We know that there are problems with some of these Senators, but we have to use carrots and sticks to push them in the right direction. This is an opportunity to offer a carrot.
* Chuck Grassley
* Lindsay Graham
* John Cornyn
* Mike Lee
* Ted Cruz
* Ben Sasse
* Josh Hawley
* Tom Cotton
* John Kennedy
* Thom Tillis
* Marsha Blackburn

|
---
[Voters are sick of President Biden's failed talking points.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjg0LTI2OWM1ODhkNTQwYjRmMWFhMGEzYmZiMWFhMGRjMDdk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZm94bmV3cy5jb20vcG9saXRpY3MvYmlkZW4tbWljaGlnYW4tcHJvdGVzdGVycy1hZ2VuZGEtaG93ZWxsP21pZD00NDQzMiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=unTlmdplXn0rykmFfzhVeA) The president traveled to Michigan last Tuesday to try and sell his "Build Back Better" agenda but was greeted by 500 protesters fed up with Biden's broken promises.

Philip Ludwig summarized what the protesters believed, saying, "We just want Biden to know we're not happy with his spending. We're not happy with the way our country's going and the job he's performing. And we would like him to step down."
|
---
**Reminders: Sign up forms and research to do**
Keep attending the monthly meetings of your local school board! You can use our [**School Board How-to Guide**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjg0LTI2OWM1ODhkNTQwYjRmMWFhMGEzYmZiMWFhMGRjMDdk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvYXR0ZW5kLXNjaG9vbC1ib2FyZC8_bWlkPTQ0NDMyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=R71rE_WLqt7bUmpKhHFbmw) again before you attend, and if you haven’t yet watched, you can view the two training webinars we recorded on attending school board meetings. You can find [the first one here](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjg0LTI2OWM1ODhkNTQwYjRmMWFhMGEzYmZiMWFhMGRjMDdk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVudC53ZWJpbmFyamFtLmNvbS9nby9yZXBsYXkvMTMva3l3a3pmcmhrcmkyczE_bWlkPTQ0NDMyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=0ILoSVecqR_yyU1K0oy2iA)**,** and [the second one here](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjg0LTI2OWM1ODhkNTQwYjRmMWFhMGEzYmZiMWFhMGRjMDdk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ldmVudC53ZWJpbmFyamFtLmNvbS9yZXBsYXkvMjYvMzN3cHlmbG5iOTNmeHdmcnc_bWlkPTQ0NDMyJmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=XW382ycvrdeXualysZFTjQ).
|
---
If you didn’t contact the medical boards and associations to reprimand them for threatening doctors who prescribe medicines like Ivermectin, **please do so this week!** [**Use our guide**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjg0LTI2OWM1ODhkNTQwYjRmMWFhMGEzYmZiMWFhMGRjMDdk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzL1NUT1AtTWVkaWNhbC1NYW5kYXRlcy1Db250YWN0LU1lZGljYWwtQm9hcmRzLWFuZC1Bc3NvY2lhdGlvbnMucGRmP21pZD00NDQzMiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=jSUvco17dMo1vN5FAOpvIA) to help you know who to contact and what to say when you email or call. These doctors are risking their careers for us, the least we can do is send an email or make a call on their behalf!

|
---
[Democrats are starting to concede defeat on their $3.5 trillion reconciliation bill.](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMjg0LTI2OWM1ODhkNTQwYjRmMWFhMGEzYmZiMWFhMGRjMDdk%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AOQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYWJjMTAuY29tL2FydGljbGUvbmV3cy9wb2xpdGljcy9uYXRpb25hbC1wb2xpdGljcy9iaWRlbi1wdXNoLWJlbmVmaXRzLXNwZW5kaW5nLXBsYW4vNTA3LTc2NjgwMGM5LThkNjUtNDZhOS1hNDM2LWIyMWU1YjllYTM4ZT9taWQ9NDQ0MzImaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=nr1DdIWzrtBPFNMb9mVjzw) The Biden White House is now acknowledging that the bill will likely have to shrink to $2.0 trillion, and many of the administration's key priorities will face the chopping block.

Even if the White House negotiates an acceptable compromise with senators like Manchin and Sinema, there is no guarantee that an increasingly restless collection of left-wing House members will vote for a reduced bill.
|

Attorney General Merrick Garland has directed federal officials to work with states on on "harassment, intimidation and threats of violence" against school boards. This order is an effort to prevent parents from being involved in their children's education and is a terrifying expansion of government power. | Stop the worst “Covid judge” in America The Biden administration has nominated Lucy Koh for the 9th circuit, and she must be stopped. name: Parents Defending Education
subject: Don’t let teachers' unions bully you
body:
Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school. But now she’s the targ
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za93sos8jff062guol4iaspbbqlk9g82eaglpkt0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jksrr0s3iekr79c9l6eon9d1hmej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf4p31c9orfdj4eppjbcj3e4q34db36lg66t5me4or9d5hcmo7asbjcth32thmmsrt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eapmccln6kqjfdr1cor61cj26pp238h1e8he4933cpj69o77c3i61oh5u)
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1rdg6lqot2e50sjm6h3fsj0ca4p2vf12tuuvt80_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjgeeo74c3h2bs) Fellow American, Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school. But now she’s the target of a lawsuit from the National Education Association (NEA) — the largest teachers’ union in the country — just for asking questions. After enrolling her daughter in kindergarten, this mom asked the principal for more information about the curriculum. **She wanted to know what would be taught about Critical Race Theory (CRT) and gender identity.** The response? This Rhode Island mom says she was told to file public records (FOIA) requests to get the information she wanted. She filed FOIA requests ... **_and now a lawsuit from the NEA has followed._** **Teachers’ unions shouldn’t bully, intimidate, or silence concerned parents, community members, or groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) that want to improve their kids’ education. ** **[If you agree, please click here to sign the declaration right now -- and join over 50,000 concerned parents and taxpayers who are standing up for a healthy, non-politicized education for our kids.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z9hdeuc8ofu581hqlu080rjjgt6v0omqtk9mr7r0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjgeeo74c3h2bs)** [**Help Us Stand Against the NEA**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgj1adau3jbo0sjt6htmr38h8t5e3rc62g02m7go_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjgeeo74c3h2bs) Parents Defending Education is a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas. Through network and coalition building, investigative reporting, litigation, and engagement on local, state, and national policies, we are fighting for the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. **Right now, teachers’ unions are a major roadblock to making that vision a reality, and it’s time for parents to start wielding the enormous power we possess to reclaim our schools.** [**You can take the first step right now by signing this national declaration.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlb39s3og7a1pe60lgnl16qmrr2401ke4aa9570o_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjgeeo74c3h2bs) You and I both know there are many thousands of outstanding teachers across the country who work hard every day to educate students and put them on a path to lifelong success. They’re the teachers who inspire your kids’ love of reading ... or spark an interest in science that leads them to a rewarding career ... or provide the mentorship and support that changes their lives. But too often this year, you and I have seen teachers’ unions put politics ahead of students and classroom learning — and lash out against parents and groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) for our involvement in our kids’ educations. At PDE, we’ve experienced this firsthand. This summer, the NEA passed a resolution at its annual conference to allocate more than $50,000 to “research” groups like Parents Defending Education. And although they used the word “research,” they really mean “investigate and smear.” If they thought this “cancel culture” tactic would intimidate us — they were wrong. We’re more committed than ever to defending a healthy, non-political education for all students. **[If you stand with PDE, as I believe you do, please add your name to this declaration to stand with students, parents, and classroom teachers over the political interests of teachers’ unions.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zge1heoqarn45frdrgjn9eeosvumo6mkoip06m28_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjgeeo74c3h2bs)** [**Help Us Stand Against the NEA**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z63jjhss69o4vb1upjlm6d3dnl7o7e02mj67jau0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjgeeo74c3h2bs) Thank you for your support. Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsfks9ib48e18ng1jh8bdlml3fh78pec4uad2vj0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjgeeo74c3h2bs) | [](twitterhttps://twitter.com/defendinged?lang=en) | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z886istm6d49d8kqm0ff4np12m23qiko7pk3mvv8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjgeeo74c3h2bs) | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvj7ejui7vt50eln6tdijrg4inh32j68esh5g520_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjgeeo74c3h2bs) | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjbb8tid6q9ug1vb4v32ci4ne0h77hbjeq5ue90g_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjgeeo74c3h2bs)
---|---|---|---|---

4532 Lee Hwy #119
Arlington VA 22207

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for GOP Presidential, [please use this preferences page](http://e.goppresidential.com/prefs/9z2z148b7sa2hhn6eg4m4s4deua1r28ttulua73fv3g).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlc35roj4edodttk9rk2nsaaaps1c40l9j1hirbg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjgeeo74c3h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: American Update
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8895%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=KB3fzzsBhxH5mkOkebNl3Q&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15073%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=QqDzMPMmfivFErnZAZwx3Q&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15074%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JCd1Fq8c4nvNOehdmVNF2Q&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c15074%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=JCd1Fq8c4nvNOehdmVNF2Q&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

clean_body: I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

# [Do you support making Washington, D.C. the 51st state? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8fbbbae0-81e9-4b60-80e0-3982da7a2305/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | Democracy took another hit last week, when the Supreme Court rejected a bid from DC residents for Congressional representation ([story](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tcc1bbe15-3f1e-478a-b6bf-6087748b95e7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)). That’s yet another blow for over 700,000 tax-paying Americans who are being denied an equal voice in our government! But this fight isn’t over. DC residents and allies across the nation are seeking another route to their goal -- making DC the 51st state. We’re polling our top activists to see if this has support. [Cast your vote now: Should D.C. become the 51st state?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te0bb2084-6102-4283-b7a9-a08b6f79bc41/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

[Take the poll: Do you support making Washington, D.C. the 51st state?](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfde6024b-f66f-4117-8fdf-250215dc5e34/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Culp for Congress
subject: Biden's DOJ Comes for Parents
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS**
body:
| | _[View online](https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BytaYp&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=ESYZ92c&)_
---
| | |
---
| | **In the latest move of government overreach, Biden's DOJ seeks to silence parents who are voicing concerns and utilizing their First Amendment right to speak out.**
---
| | **Parents are taking a stand to defend their children against Critical Race Theory, mask mandates, and other leftist ideals being pushed in our public school systems.**
We have seen a rise in attendance and involvement by parents at local school board meetings to voice their legitimate concerns about what's being taught in schools. This is the grassroots standing up and exactly what my campaign for Governor was all about--empowering We the People to stand up. And over 1.7 million of you did stand up. I need you to stand up with me again as we take the fight against the RINOs in our own party who support Joe Biden and his radical group of lawless tyrants.
Biden and the leftist Democrat Party can't have parents deciding what's best for their children; they want to parent **_your_** children and bully you into submission. The Democrats and weak Republican RINOs like Newhouse, Butler, Cheney, McConnell, and others want you to sit quietly and do what you're told. They want to control your family from the womb to the tomb--**but we won't let that happen.**
**The Department of Justice released a statement on October 4th demonizing parents' right to speak out.**
In that press release, the DOJ said _" The Justice Department will launch a series of additional efforts....to include the creation of a task force..."_ They go on to say _ "The Justice Department will also create specialized training and guidance...this training will help school board members and other potential victims understand the type of behavior that constitutes threats, how to report threatening conduct to the appropriate law enforcement agencies, and how to capture and preserve evidence of threatening conduct to aid in the investigation and prosecution of these crimes."_
They're trying to silence you by threatening to prosecute you and turn you into criminals. You have every right to exercise the first amendment to stand up before a local school board and demand accountability for what they are teaching.
Read their statement [_here._](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SZ4XJn&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EGsYJ3E&)
---
|
---
**On top of what the DOJ is doing Biden has appointed a critical race theory activist to the Department of Education.**
**_That is why I want to abolish the Department of Education_** and give the power back to "We the People" as well as give the control back to states and local communities. Parents deserve control over what is being taught to their children as well as school choice. I will stand up for families when I'm elected as your Congressman. If Newhouse was going to stand up to fight for you, he would have done so by now. He's had plenty of opportunities. What will it take to get him in the fight? I'm betting he won't fight against the would-be tyrants because he either agrees with them or he lacks the courage.
**We need our public servants to stand up for us. We need public servants with courage.**
We can no longer accept the failure of RINO's who side with the Biden agenda, and the radicals in Congress like Nancy Pelosi. As your public servant, I will uphold the constitution and fight for America and the future generation of Americans.
Honored to serve.
**_S_**[** _tand up for America._**](https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SZ4XFH&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EGcWIs7&)
Loren
