clean_body: | | & | | | | | In the latest move of government overreach, Biden's DOJ seeks to silence parents who are voicing concerns and utilizing their First Amendment right to speak out. | | Parents are taking a stand to defend their children against Critical Race Theory, mask mandates, and other leftist ideals being pushed in our public school systems. We have seen a rise in attendance and involvement by parents at local school board meetings to voice their legitimate concerns about what's being taught in schools. This is the grassroots standing up and exactly what my campaign for Governor was all about--empowering We the People to stand up. And over 1.7 million of you did stand up. I need you to stand up with me again as we take the fight against the RINOs in our own party who support Joe Biden and his radical group of lawless tyrants. Biden and the leftist Democrat Party can't have parents deciding what's best for their children; they want to parent your children and bully you into submission. The Democrats and weak Republican RINOs like Newhouse, Butler, Cheney, McConnell, and others want you to sit quietly and do what you're told. They want to control your family from the womb to the tomb--but we won't let that happen. The Department of Justice released a statement on October 4th demonizing parents' right to speak out. In that press release, the DOJ said " The Justice Department will launch a series of additional efforts....to include the creation of a task force..." They go on to say "The Justice Department will also create specialized training and guidance...this training will help school board members and other potential victims understand the type of behavior that constitutes threats, how to report threatening conduct to the appropriate law enforcement agencies, and how to capture and preserve evidence of threatening conduct to aid in the investigation and prosecution of these crimes." They're trying to silence you by threatening to prosecute you and turn you into criminals. You have every right to exercise the first amendment to stand up before a local school board and demand accountability for what they are teaching. Read their statement & | On top of what the DOJ is doing Biden has appointed a critical race theory activist to the Department of Education. That is why I want to abolish the Department of Education and give the power back to "We the People" as well as give the control back to states and local communities. Parents deserve control over what is being taught to their children as well as school choice. I will stand up for families when I'm elected as your Congressman. If Newhouse was going to stand up to fight for you, he would have done so by now. He's had plenty of opportunities. What will it take to get him in the fight? I'm betting he won't fight against the would-be tyrants because he either agrees with them or he lacks the courage. We need our public servants to stand up for us. We need public servants with courage. We can no longer accept the failure of RINO's who side with the Biden agenda, and the radicals in Congress like Nancy Pelosi. As your public servant, I will uphold the constitution and fight for America and the future generation of Americans. Honored to serve. S& Loren | & | & | & | & PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS | | , 11035 Lavender Hill Drive, Suite 160, Box 194, Las vegas, NV 89135, United States You may or at any time. Powered by:&

name: Jason Miyares for Attorney General
subject: Miriam’s Story: Fleeing Cuba
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Miyares for Virginia |
body:
56 years ago today, a scared 19-year old teenager in Havana, Cuba made the choice to flee a communist dictatorship in search of freedom. [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=828db06d274a4b04b2737ef2ccfd7f07&_e=keG8JJgfUc5ABPPNz55jBjxEzomQLhjabq9zQcTIog_dGp-MaY3KrlFWE34IHF4azDFO3f9FKW5BKF1dlXntYtZOkFhA4elRfjAtMDAjF24R0O07FQg4AMIagxCUO2SjBLwFUqaQ27eTgiIqbZEl0De-2-sOl1nSkvh_zPylFNz9WfMX7FvCbgDDpttCDz7OHiHppvVm9lcYK5l4bmckSftoGduqF689EMNoZndZ7-NFS1yBY4sBB6Cz9-fYgWvaUR_4RDm3WP8O39FniuAXmFwj8JOU63PWTCB40D_6dQcDxWJ3Al9ya2WxhMPPvGHiAUYH-Y3Vk0jow0o1FGrIjzh0jWria1_kZUC21tlXilaiW1eOwCN3kHOMKZ0B5N6rMcME-2URGTUxvVEABbw1oMgcrSg1BPTWiA04y7bagqflDe0ssm0vxTT5m5N-5lRXCP6oPgRhdheUaT81wgWMwJYv_rHZVxFO2v8bsr9Zu-s%3D) | |
---
Friend,

56 years ago today, a scared 19-year old teenager in Havana, Cuba made the choice to flee a communist dictatorship in search of freedom.

That was my mother, Miriam Maria Miyares. She made the decision to leave everything she had ever known, her childhood home, in hopes of one day coming to the United States.
[**Watch Now: Miriam's Message**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=828db06d274a4b04b2737ef2ccfd7f07&_e=keG8JJgfUc5ABPPNz55jBjxEzomQLhjabq9zQcTIog_dGp-MaY3KrlFWE34IHF4azDFO3f9FKW5BKF1dlXntYtZOkFhA4elRfjAtMDAjF24R0O07FQg4AMIagxCUO2SjBLwFUqaQ27eTgiIqbZEl0De-2-sOl1nSkvh_zPylFNz9WfMX7FvCbgDDpttCDz7OHiHppvVm9lcYK5l4bmckSftoGduqF689EMNoZndZ7-NFS1yBY4sBB6Cz9-fYgWvaUR_4RDm3WP8O39FniuAXmLDtaggYhnczqGh57uXodA7id90gllKGfrp9xavhp4j3wZsIJuRa92OeoZ4Hpi0pZDSVt78s3kxKS-L89fpuDbWndSzsGP5fUoWAbFg3ktDysj5OjTAY85KiLkWoCnyhimAanfet0YldsHaTRTcGTU4avImDWC7BN4D9vtezI9DlJ_qgp_6YP2IGky6gGUCRkwBklgvZOkUcpS21E_ru5yE%3D)
She was penniless, homeless, and without any idea of what her future would hold. I will always be grateful to my mother for her incredible bravery and foresight in fleeing Cuba so she could one day give her future children the life she would never know living under communism.

Growing up in the household of someone who fled the horrors of Castro's despotic regime leaves you with a profound love of this country and a deep appreciation to grow up in the land of the free and the home of the brave. October 11, 1965 saw a young woman fleeing a dictatorship where people had no voice, no democracy, and a government with no consent of the governed.

October 11, 2021, 56 six years later, the child of that brave young woman is asking his fellow citizens for their vote to become the next Attorney General of the Commonwealth of Virginia, the first Hispanic elected statewide, and the first son of an immigrant elected as Attorney General.
[**Watch Now: Miriam's Message**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=828db06d274a4b04b2737ef2ccfd7f07&_e=keG8JJgfUc5ABPPNz55jBuk3_UnDQZmdTC9TNLnI6LUk_6xcYDHO3HdxA6oi8c0uIvTXJg1xRUFbTQFTC0J8IJX16A2Jvnck6e0cKgOaZZ4gXRbks4p55FGMQpu7XRGspyHxc39X8zRRPu4Y0ll9AgHy5CKc0aAfFYLUrF32jsrntaY2g4r8GMb7GTBDfJ_fCFlmJ2fmakSHC6G_-_TgFE9T-RayORUlXPN5O7G8Wh5CWKayfaiNdoRHbLJUU7L-hfWRUmrE7BMKrmNr3W7tabvmvGBR3plFqP0jh8Bu1COI2bbChiG9xTkC7jX90saOHD5uXYBCdmBIAq8lO92f1S_CJxHRG8ZS6wHqtXtJI45HJ5uB1HwhJg2mnfKMFdAuAGjrBa-KqKnJJ3JgoVulvz3NwsTf5PPlFJcRYpnfw_FWc-wfPJ2JkRjzuA05qnM_nivf3Yj3tgUMANf6jYrv4lGEXL3Fsa0rh2ezsLtXNag%3D)
A wise man once said that in America, it doesn't matter where you come from as much as where you are going. **How true.**

On this special "anniversary" day, I am reminded of the precious liberty and freedom that makes such a noble country that has provided more opportunity and second chances than any nation in history.

The genius of America and its unique place in the world is on display every time I ask a fellow Virginian for their confidence and vote. Despite the many problems facing our nation today, it is easy to forget that America remains the most powerful experience in self-government and democracy the world has ever seen.

Never has a nation provided so much, so many, and been the last refuge for those fleeing some of the worst oppression known to man.

_Thank you to the brave men and women who wear the uniform and keep us free. _

_Thank you to the United States for granting refuge to the Miyares Family. _

_And thank you dearest Mamita, for making the decision all those years ago so your children could breathe the air of freemen. Mi más profundo agradecimiento! _
[**Watch Now: Miriam's Message**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=828db06d274a4b04b2737ef2ccfd7f07&_e=keG8JJgfUc5ABPPNz55jBuk3_UnDQZmdTC9TNLnI6LUk_6xcYDHO3HdxA6oi8c0uIvTXJg1xRUFbTQFTC0J8IJX16A2Jvnck6e0cKgOaZZ4gXRbks4p55FGMQpu7XRGspyHxc39X8zRRPu4Y0ll9AgHy5CKc0aAfFYLUrF32jsrntaY2g4r8GMb7GTBDfJ_fCFlmJ2fmakSHC6G_-_TgFE9T-RayORUlXPN5O7G8Wh5CWKayfaiNdoRHbLJUU7L-hfWRUmrE7BMKrmNr3W7taayHTB85jKcr-jOwBly0dMxBEFbqNqDBkyqhvK1bQeM7Xeu974tyafrR9y5obS6ygu47_cUw1j1H56SS4-XIACm9ZO2LMNAtzytYrTGBJVdY4xSK2k-z9yH9PwO4UPL49rFbrxikuPTu6sVvKPDpI7xxbw6s7KqJwAcr0a8Y1St5JNAQknFPoO0yCxkLyjwt_10vI7rkcw-PDOh1Ue6l-vo%3D)
As always, I remain, Yours in Freedom,
-Jason Miyares

_There are less than 30 days until Election Day on November 2nd, if you can please show your support for Jason Miyares for Attorney General by chipping in $5 or $10 at this link here:[**https://secure.winred.com/miyares-for-virginia/action-3007492**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=828db06d274a4b04b2737ef2ccfd7f07&_e=keG8JJgfUc5ABPPNz55jBuk3_UnDQZmdTC9TNLnI6LUk_6xcYDHO3HdxA6oi8c0u13ZyQcu9XEdRNb6UCKmvwP5KdMhXcjq-sTgato2MI_WkF-TkS916FC3EwKbhKHMmk2h-LZ68ENH6ZN6G2Nq47TnElcnZRXcMTieAwwWIneJnRC38-0ShpPT9hblv3-CGW4ePajcsOoZvIeXXDXlGxLIqF7XI0qnRHfKVLiq9hGZug0dNcz2XAY946ZCPhQlpgers29p8qPaU5eNjgwwt4IZb1m43_CckARHYy29AfsLq8rzTY4xGQopSOuYAc3ZkKGHVQzEHfP2ryLCsZEyieGw3w1i7b_nd8ZiTEisc-K4es8I9Pa5a2kesehXTUlj5veTKZvSMgKKvrHOdahF8ZG7C57jseVHNbfOuBZNLoIjGUId_YRrbqyeMkgUJeEgXPP-iJMx0ONoVr-nfhwDRUtJV0w3GQqljv7IYrP7twXY%3D)_

Fellow Conservative, It's critical that we win back the Senate and we can't do that without winning in Missouri.

My name is Billy Long and I’m a United States Congressman, former small business owner, former radio host and father; but above all, **I am a proud conservative American.**

**As a front-line Republican and steadfast conservative voice in Washington, Democrats have long targeted me.** The Left simply cannot stand how we’re helping the American public come to the realization that **[Democrat leaders in America are more focused on tearing apart the Republican Party than delivering for the American people.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=051a3688009744ddb9851a5801221ac8&_e=TT8w0JdACLBCzjB1lQdYCJg9nUmwD10dbESPL6eDEde1Fhb3xmEUXFP5zH_xBeGsGyuIiNG25VjciF1OvSYRsSpnpzDi-yw268T0QMiA4AJ_xWCYzWDIxoG5TZVhmxoZ3OoONkxhqtc4gJeH_2_ZSYI5Y0wk2knkFx8uSXFAxY4dj-wshBTAtEN2PPJ-FRx99-zfjFQ11BX7eEAKbVFGmLW7Dkw7AqafvoF-fDW1TH5vxE1eJGZRscWtsq0K1GEteUmXZm530BAPYUtJTYf4E20FCJqAvz4OSn9E7LY6BGE4lWovhcRROfOyNigAM78mepHIFiBgldV_sj_U53PojjK8s55K_ZqMuidHCBs_D3sAbTlk1bcuv_LjyQS3_61R9zKg0neE1SkursE0-DtCZ1_MULG4HvwoUgxpzTyIcbdDiN42zQJA2QXW_mZ0__RE7SeEci1qEC6n0rMcpvjws69eZlr24C_sdNVaiAGHJwk1h-L80jy4qfKtD9qbHKy6e879ErDDgXYbf0FFD_vecVF4qgOZFmLvEvrxYxHxQo5Y3BtIuLa7l6lwW76dJ7wgXWxi_5M5K2QROWdmTcGuag%3D%3D)**

I stepped up to the plate to represent Missouri’s 7th Congressional District when Roy Blunt decided to run for the Senate in 2011 and I’m stepping up again to continue my fight in the Senate upon his retirement next year. **We CANNOT allow Democrats to take this seat. We are so close to a Senate majority, and this would derail our efforts exponentially!**

**[That's why today I'm asking you – as one of the most valued members of the American conservative movement – to personally endorse my campaign for United States Senate.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=051a3688009744ddb9851a5801221ac8&_e=TT8w0JdACLBCzjB1lQdYCJg9nUmwD10dbESPL6eDEde1Fhb3xmEUXFP5zH_xBeGsGyuIiNG25VjciF1OvSYRsSpnpzDi-yw268T0QMiA4AJ_xWCYzWDIxoG5TZVhmxoZ3OoONkxhqtc4gJeH_2_ZSYI5Y0wk2knkFx8uSXFAxY4dj-wshBTAtEN2PPJ-FRx99-zfjFQ11BX7eEAKbVFGmLW7Dkw7AqafvoF-fDW1TH5vxE1eJGZRscWtsq0K1GEteUmXZm530BAPYUtJTYf4E20FCJqAvz4OSn9E7LY6BGE4lWovhcRROfOyNigAM78mepHIFiBgldV_sj_U53PojjK8s55K_ZqMuidHCBs_D3sAbTlk1bcuv_LjyQS3_61RkRXzPaidkn1vl95zSpfV7u_oQ8gy-QQtrXi007ajhf4CZvC1CpXCOWvY7iTuphrWdBoii6hhPBNc-vrNfiE8JbqR2mslqed_MBj74hDh2nWE7YPCJg0rtYFqy00Q6lF9KDlKEon4yxfUXLshTP5nhpEB4gx4w4P3i4co58_VUqmdJUvPPWWy1qi5XKvr7p5R0F2bUrAKFa23-LUvXpCAYA%3D%3D)**

**With the Democrats raking in millions to break the 50-50 Senate tie, we MUST build the momentum needed to protect our red seats,_especially this one in Missouri._**

**[Please, consider endorsing my campaign today](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=051a3688009744ddb9851a5801221ac8&_e=TT8w0JdACLBCzjB1lQdYCJg9nUmwD10dbESPL6eDEde1Fhb3xmEUXFP5zH_xBeGsGyuIiNG25VjciF1OvSYRsSpnpzDi-yw268T0QMiA4AJ_xWCYzWDIxoG5TZVhmxoZ3OoONkxhqtc4gJeH_2_ZSYI5Y0wk2knkFx8uSXFAxY4dj-wshBTAtEN2PPJ-FRx99-zfjFQ11BX7eEAKbVFGmLW7Dkw7AqafvoF-fDW1TH5vxE1eJGZRscWtsq0K1GEteUmXZm530BAPYUtJTYf4E20FCJqAvz4OSn9E7LY6BGE4lWovhcRROfOyNigAM78mepHIFiBgldV_sj_U53PojjK8s55K_ZqMuidHCBs_D3sAbTlk1bcuv_LjyQS3_61RlulnThRr0uMhoWqUcHUI-qQqYldKdOhwoByYzrmSuMCfWRZfMClsps3-h0pofG0LEy9WOlJNIDZxE4E9DsUv1Cfv-2umdRQ_0hP3PqOKJ154wqdBs8mGFeyfAjrwEMpcHy3KedzahFKlIw21Dp2CzMRdLj7huWLM-91FJ1ZLAv6beuSiip-72Fil0H00hTbYZNmftLSGhdIeg2PqiXfM2w%3D%3D)** and let’s get to work fighting for our conservative values in Washington!

name: Parents Defending Education
subject: Don’t let teachers' unions bully you
body:
Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school. But now she’s the targ
[](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z7uedq38honfqkbggso0358bk7gm8q3g1ar1kcto_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or2chh2bs) Fellow American, Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school. But now she’s the target of a lawsuit from the National Education Association (NEA) — the largest teachers’ union in the country — just for asking questions. After enrolling her daughter in kindergarten, this mom asked the principal for more information about the curriculum. **She wanted to know what would be taught about Critical Race Theory (CRT) and gender identity.** The response? This Rhode Island mom says she was told to file public records (FOIA) requests to get the information she wanted. She filed FOIA requests ... **_and now a lawsuit from the NEA has followed._** **Teachers’ unions shouldn’t bully, intimidate, or silence concerned parents, community members, or groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) that want to improve their kids’ education. ** **[If you agree, please click here to sign the declaration right now -- and join over 50,000 concerned parents and taxpayers who are standing up for a healthy, non-politicized education for our kids.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zuloadrdsij69dsjkn6v845gtas4aoucpqn53fi0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or2chh2bs)** [**Help Us Stand Against the NEA**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zbu7e5ru0rmdqolafjotopcelbphecdcad09tbo8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or2chh2bs) Parents Defending Education is a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas. Through network and coalition building, investigative reporting, litigation, and engagement on local, state, and national policies, we are fighting for the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. **Right now, teachers’ unions are a major roadblock to making that vision a reality, and it’s time for parents to start wielding the enormous power we possess to reclaim our schools.** [**You can take the first step right now by signing this national declaration.**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z7rhrcp23378pf5v48hso572ls4p6oelgbch5ia8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or2chh2bs) You and I both know there are many thousands of outstanding teachers across the country who work hard every day to educate students and put them on a path to lifelong success. They’re the teachers who inspire your kids’ love of reading ... or spark an interest in science that leads them to a rewarding career ... or provide the mentorship and support that changes their lives. But too often this year, you and I have seen teachers’ unions put politics ahead of students and classroom learning — and lash out against parents and groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) for our involvement in our kids’ educations. At PDE, we’ve experienced this firsthand. This summer, the NEA passed a resolution at its annual conference to allocate more than $50,000 to “research” groups like Parents Defending Education. And although they used the word “research,” they really mean “investigate and smear.” If they thought this “cancel culture” tactic would intimidate us — they were wrong. We’re more committed than ever to defending a healthy, non-political education for all students. **[If you stand with PDE, as I believe you do, please add your name to this declaration to stand with students, parents, and classroom teachers over the political interests of teachers’ unions.](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zbb0jf5jnc95gbtr0743lpiomrb9itu545ulsvg8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or2chh2bs)** [**Help Us Stand Against the NEA**](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zfgo3n4fbv575cj12aduccg2t83uhc5tit40v2co_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or2chh2bs) Thank you for your support. Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zjsvd1oidcgn6t5t4iepg5kk6tmftjt42ngj09e0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or2chh2bs) | [](twitterhttps://twitter.com/defendinged?lang=en) | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zhfjkocrshbbb45pkv0m33edhgltj6teimk5qlgo_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or2chh2bs) | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zv2g2kq5hsnj42hi3v5ash1n2ff3qrcjnij481t0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or2chh2bs) | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zqf20ptjrsh1aknc9rp1b5ndb191iqjcjc6lanfg_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or2chh2bs)

subject: Big Pharma, medical firms routed $750,000 to a single Democrat.
body:
Right now, Big Pharma is spending tens of millions of dollars to defeat prescription drug price negotiation. |

Friend,

**Right now, Big Pharma is spending tens of millions of dollars to defeat one of the most popular proposals in Biden's Build Back Better agenda: prescription drug price negotiation.**

Big Pharma is taking advantage of Democrats' narrow majority. Here in Austin, they are running ads opposing the US government's ability to negotiate the price of prescription drugs through Medicare. In Arizona, the Center Forward PAC -- a group funded by the pharmaceutical industry -- is sending out mailers praising Kyrsten Sinema. Big Pharma and medical firms have also routed $750,000 to her campaign.

It's no secret that the cost of prescription drugs in the United States is massively marked up. In some cases we pay 10 to 20 times what people in other countries pay for the same drugs. The Biden administration is trying to fix this, but with a 50-50 split in the Senate, a handful of Democrats are holding up the solution.

**Friend: If elected to Congress, you'll never have to question whose side I'm on -- I'll be on the side of working families against Big Pharma and the corporate lobby -- but I need your help in order to win this race:**

[**Can you support my campaign with a $3 contribution today? Anything you give will go toward our ambitious field organizing effort to reach more voters on these issues so that I can hold the line for working families in Congress.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37443506/311087280/1898666321?refcode=em-101121-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTNlMTYxZC1lMjJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swV7nZvO-9U0YlSWTnrRht5TmJXUo2hF8NG37tEP8X8=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37443507/311087281/1898666321?refcode=em-101121-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NTNlMTYxZC1lMjJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=swV7nZvO-9U0YlSWTnrRht5TmJXUo2hF8NG37tEP8X8=)

name: Parents Defending Education
subject: Don’t let teachers' unions bully you
body:
Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school. But now she’s the targ
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z97l7qgcoikbeeklaa43a9m5svv7umerpkmtq7k0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or3clh2bs) Fellow American, Like many parents, one Rhode Island mom wanted to know what her daughter would be taught in school. But now she’s the target of a lawsuit from the National Education Association (NEA) — the largest teachers’ union in the country — just for asking questions. After enrolling her daughter in kindergarten, this mom asked the principal for more information about the curriculum. **She wanted to know what would be taught about Critical Race Theory (CRT) and gender identity.** The response? This Rhode Island mom says she was told to file public records (FOIA) requests to get the information she wanted. She filed FOIA requests ... **_and now a lawsuit from the NEA has followed._** **Teachers’ unions shouldn’t bully, intimidate, or silence concerned parents, community members, or groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) that want to improve their kids’ education. ** **[If you agree, please click here to sign the declaration right now -- and join over 50,000 concerned parents and taxpayers who are standing up for a healthy, non-politicized education for our kids.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoehol5ffiv1360a1vk994it19eoqqdusqijrck8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or3clh2bs)** [**Help Us Stand Against the NEA**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zao4j58el8rc1fuhfbpirr5l1aj2t4v5ven9chi0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or3clh2bs) Parents Defending Education is a national grassroots organization working to reclaim our schools from activists promoting harmful agendas. Through network and coalition building, investigative reporting, litigation, and engagement on local, state, and national policies, we are fighting for the restoration of a healthy, non-political education for our kids. **Right now, teachers’ unions are a major roadblock to making that vision a reality, and it’s time for parents to start wielding the enormous power we possess to reclaim our schools.** [**You can take the first step right now by signing this national declaration.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhgbujiomgtbnqhv06h8lcai3co1ss56e2tptte0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or3clh2bs) You and I both know there are many thousands of outstanding teachers across the country who work hard every day to educate students and put them on a path to lifelong success. They’re the teachers who inspire your kids’ love of reading ... or spark an interest in science that leads them to a rewarding career ... or provide the mentorship and support that changes their lives. But too often this year, you and I have seen teachers’ unions put politics ahead of students and classroom learning — and lash out against parents and groups like Parents Defending Education (PDE) for our involvement in our kids’ educations. At PDE, we’ve experienced this firsthand. This summer, the NEA passed a resolution at its annual conference to allocate more than $50,000 to “research” groups like Parents Defending Education. And although they used the word “research,” they really mean “investigate and smear.” If they thought this “cancel culture” tactic would intimidate us — they were wrong. We’re more committed than ever to defending a healthy, non-political education for all students. **[If you stand with PDE, as I believe you do, please add your name to this declaration to stand with students, parents, and classroom teachers over the political interests of teachers’ unions.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zkmr6domd325t9uc1pt5v46qc3sfc2tfl9d4a9d0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or3clh2bs)** [**Help Us Stand Against the NEA**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zv4huro3h626sojode1e1d1au5rlcvojsapbhe98_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or3clh2bs) Thank you for your support. Nicole Neily President Parents Defending Education | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za1t0eup5grg1kjs6508kutpf7hcuege6rl0smb8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or3clh2bs) | [](twitterhttps://twitter.com/defendinged?lang=en) | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zf3s6l0mvdi7iipmgfb4ll3id5ulod2dahsgnqb8_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or3clh2bs) | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9d71udt4vmtd3art9lfti2e0cphf90l24khctso_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or3clh2bs) | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk51lbcd064pciuj1q49df8h7kab1r8jgg3rohi0_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or3clh2bs)
---|---|---|---|---

4532 Lee Hwy #119
Arlington VA 22207

[**Visit ICYMI News**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0ck8sblhs6oa7454lrj6u0iau6rluqc427mmt3g_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or3clh2bs)

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2ce1mqoi1qpovpv33acgus3ne749bpuvd82917o_rp22sh2s8i66pj6cjge9or3clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprcst4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf9v0mnhiadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4lqu1cbhe1pef9t56eibcd7lmipradrmeej3fddnkcrr4tdnklprctbi6pr34t5ge5qbfctnkjhf4onmmgqe1cjn6apn2ppgm1o7aohk6konaptjeuqe4sj6eor7ec32cdh3adtm65qbech5u)

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zormcjthtk7o00irrjb4iqmg30u9dcf0e8i9tmo8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cpie1p73cdim49fg)

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: END Pelosi’s majority.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress

She knows that if we win Texas’s brand-new 38th district, her majority is LOST. That’s why I’m proud to endorse fellow U.S. Army veteran, Captain Wesley Hunt, as he leads the fight to win this new seat and FLIP the House from Pelosi’s control. Over the last 9 months, the American people have suffered under Joe Biden and Nancy Pelosi’s disastrous agenda. Our only hope of stopping them in their tracks is to take back the House and place a check on Biden’s never-ending FAILURE. But Pelosi and her DCCC have been on a fundraising blitz, breaking record after record, ever since Wesley launched his campaign. That’s why I’m asking YOU to join me in supporting Wesley at this critical moment -- we can’t allow the Left’s attacks against him to go unanswered. Thank you, Mike Pompeo 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. | | Team — We have a huge endorsement update to share with you! **NARAL, one of the nation’s leading reproductive rights groups, just endorsed Steve for re-election!** While this is great news, we just checked our files and realized **we’re missing another really important endorsement — _yours!_** [](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcvIZrrsPi2ArbSUBJFmQlgI74W0sGNtZ2i7os-YVfE-u38M8nol9bpycLhEu_YXX6EVCPZMeCJ-kyLHYRJjNx_Uy5sT35-IQP9xzKyOu7mJwa5fUva2zQuyk4MqySpGixrpeK9DvOSgoby8EWo5zSkk1rrxELmxCCVHNl-gYEqIm7zTSNq0D7deY5tcZZmNKOM7sZlIijEDxMpZl4EceNrSx9wL93ImcxqW0zc2gJQOIR_vZdCG5ejKEbDwL28O9-1ThQCWnM5wt7Mw0s5_ceebQrl4i9Q006jpuyKIeHHz9MRkzD56e9BHlyWysJb4k_4fdBWP31xz_yodnLHTkyE/3g2/5YLaUO2dQ7i5vIN9F4vLRg/h1/t8R8zVnbJ11085lPmurt2ctKLwJ0Nxs0D-PuNusZET0) In case it isn’t quite clear why **your endorsement is critical for Steve to have,** here are a few refreshers:

* This campaign was built to advocate for _every_ Nevadan.
* Our grassroots movement isn’t sustainable without your help.

name: Jasmine
subject: My story, on National Coming Out Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress
body:
---
| | | Below is a longer, personal note about my coming out story. If you're able to pitch in, [**please click here to make a donation.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37443810/311088394/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211011_FR_ComingOutDay_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWQ1Y2MyYS1lNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ajGGoPB7mq0YrzGR8miEu3bkrN9ORuoXNtQ9ycKqE6w=)
---
Peter: This is a longer, but especially important, email about why I’m running for Congress to defeat Madison Cawthorn.
It’s also National Coming Out Day so I thought I’d share my coming out story with you and some thoughts on how that connects to this moment and my campaign.
[**I hope after you’re done reading, you’ll chip in $25 or more to ensure we have the resources to fund our organizing work and run a winning campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37443811/311088395/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211011_FR_ComingOutDay_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWQ1Y2MyYS1lNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ajGGoPB7mq0YrzGR8miEu3bkrN9ORuoXNtQ9ycKqE6w=)
| | [Donate ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37443812/311088396/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211011_FR_ComingOutDay_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWQ1Y2MyYS1lNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ajGGoPB7mq0YrzGR8miEu3bkrN9ORuoXNtQ9ycKqE6w=)
---
As a LGBTQ person, you never really stop coming out. Instead, it’s a part of daily life, with countless moments and choices about how you talk about your life, how you dress, how you move through the world.
That’s true for me right now, as we campaign across Western NC, knocking doors, organizing in parking lots and back yards. The moment I introduce myself and talk about my family -- Meg and our three kids, the four loves of my life -- I come out again. Each time, I feel proud and I am also reminded why coming out matters.
Sometimes I also feel that familiar feeling of my pulse racing. When you come out to a stranger, you do not know how they will react. But what I have learned again and again is that, inevitably, there is someone in the room who also needs to hear those words, and that makes it worth it to say them.
For me, this process started when I was 18 and came out for the first time. It ushered in a new chapter of my life -- one that was both more honest and riskier. Telling the truth about who I am was an enormous relief on one hand; on the other, it tested some of the most important relationships in my life.
And it meant letting go of a lot. I stopped feeling at home in the church, even though my faith never wavered. It wasn’t easy to imagine a future for myself in North Carolina, as much as this was home to me.
I knew that ultimately this was where I belonged, even though I still harbored questions, and sometimes fear, about what it would mean to be out here. I started organizing political campaigns and LGBTQ rights campaigns. And I met my wife Meghann.
When we got married in 2008, our marriage was not legally recognized in North Carolina, or most places in the country. It was a daily reminder to us of the work that needed to happen.
When I followed a call to ministry, I knew that part of my work would focus on the public square and what it means to be a LGBTQ person of faith in the South. So with Meghann’s support, we launched the Campaign for Southern Equality together.
We were told that what we were doing was unrealistic and that we were reaching way beyond the stars. But with patience and grit, we kept pushing forward. And finally, marriage equality became legal across all 50 states.
**That’s why on this National Coming Out Day, I’m celebrating all of the progress that’s been made and reflecting on how far we still have to go. On a daily basis, I’m reminded of what’s at stake, especially for LGBTQ youth who are bravely coming out.**
If we’re going to ensure our laws finally work to fully protect LGBTQ people, then we must defend and expand our House and Senate majorities and pass the Equality Act.
We never gave up on the fight for marriage equality until we won. That’s how I feel about this race to be the next NC-11 representative.
[**We win when we work together. Will you please chip in $25 or more today to our grassroots campaign to help us spread our message and organize across Western NC.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37443813/311088397/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211011_FR_ComingOutDay_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWQ1Y2MyYS1lNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ajGGoPB7mq0YrzGR8miEu3bkrN9ORuoXNtQ9ycKqE6w=)
| | [Donate $25 ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37443814/311088398/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211011_FR_ComingOutDay_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWQ1Y2MyYS1lNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ajGGoPB7mq0YrzGR8miEu3bkrN9ORuoXNtQ9ycKqE6w=)
---
| | [Other amount ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37443815/311088399/2014934148?refcode=EM_BS_JAS_211011_FR_ComingOutDay_A0_na_U1_X2&amount=50&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWQ1Y2MyYS1lNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ajGGoPB7mq0YrzGR8miEu3bkrN9ORuoXNtQ9ycKqE6w=)
---
National Coming Out Day is about celebrating the LGBTQ community. It’s about supporting people who are coming out for the first time. And it’s about recommitting to being brave and strong about working to create a world where things considered “impossible” actually happen.
We’re in this together -- always.
\-- Jasmine

| | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37443816/311088400/-1793828317?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYWQ1Y2MyYS1lNDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ajGGoPB7mq0YrzGR8miEu3bkrN9ORuoXNtQ9ycKqE6w=&emci=fb3703ac-cb2a-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&emdi=2ad5cc2a-e42a-ec11-981f-c896653b9208&ceid=22032259)

That’s why on this National Coming Out Day, I’m celebrating all of the progress that’s been made and reflecting on how far we still have to go. On a daily basis, I’m reminded of what’s at stake, especially for LGBTQ youth who are bravely coming out. If we’re going to ensure our laws finally work to fully protect LGBTQ people, then we must defend and expand our House and Senate majorities and pass the Equality Act. We never gave up on the fight for marriage equality until we won. That’s how I feel about this race to be the next NC-11 representative. = | | = | | = National Coming Out Day is about celebrating the LGBTQ community. It’s about supporting people who are coming out for the first time. And it’s about recommitting to being brave and strong about working to create a world where things considered “impossible” actually happen. We’re in this together -- always. \-- Jasmine | | We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, . If you’d like to remove yourself from our list, please click . If you'd like to support our campaign, you can click below to make a donation. | | = | Paid for by Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress Jasmine Beach-Ferrara for Congress PO Box 7553 Asheville, NC 28802 United States mailto:info@jasmineforcongress.com

I'm speechless.

**FIRST:** I watched Republicans spread dangerous lies to discredit Democrats' election victory.

**THEN:** I watched them launch over 400 voter suppression bills nationwide to keep Democrats from ever winning again.

**NOW:** Reports indicate our Democrats could be locked out of the Majority for a DECADE if we don't act quickly.
| [I don't say this lightly: Republicans are INCHES from sweeping back into power and DESTROYING our Democratic House Majority. Not on my watch.](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/_)
---

**[I’m calling for a flood of grassroots support like I’ve never seen before -- 1,000 gifts before midnight -- to close our budget gap and rip Republicans’ plans of regaining power to shreds. I’m asking for your help and your $3 to hand House Republicans a HUMILIATING defeat. Can you step up to defend our House Democrats before midnight? It would mean everything to me. >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

I need you to make a pivotal choice in this moment:

\-- We can either let Republicans pass voter suppression bills nationwide, DESCEND on our Majority, and take back power for a DECADE.

subject: my story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Lopez for Governor
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37444119/311090170/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk263-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWU1ZmJmNS1lNjJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5MSpQXZOXtH7FxNIG_F_DDlok4xSXigrBh-3HEfP_s=)
---
Friend,

I'm writing today to personally ask you to become one of the 500 Founding Donors we need to defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona's governorship blue. **But first, let me explain why I'm running – and why I need your urgent support to win. **
My story is the story of Arizona: I'm a proud child of immigrants, and my parents taught me that _la promesa_ of Arizona is that if you work hard and dream big, anything is possible.

Throughout my life, I've been blessed to live that promise – and I've dedicated my life to making it real for others. From being elected mayor of my hometown to serving in the Obama administration, I've always sought to bring people together to solve big problems.
But with the failed leadership of Republicans like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey – politicians who would rather divide us and spread lies about the 2020 election than tackle the real problems facing our state – that promise is no longer being met. **I'm running for governor to restore the promise of Arizona, but I'm going to need you with me to win. So please, if you're ready for a change, I have to ask: **
**[Will you give $5 or more now to become a Founding Donor of our people-powered movement to defeat GOP extremism, flip Arizona blue and restore the promise of our great state?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37444120/311090171/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk263-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWU1ZmJmNS1lNjJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5MSpQXZOXtH7FxNIG_F_DDlok4xSXigrBh-3HEfP_s=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37444121/311090172/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk263-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWU1ZmJmNS1lNjJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5MSpQXZOXtH7FxNIG_F_DDlok4xSXigrBh-3HEfP_s=)
Becoming a Founding Donor of our campaign is about more than a donation – it's about joining our movement to transform our broken education system, revitalize our economy and build a state that works for _all_ our people.

Your support is essential to power Democrats to victory once again in Arizona – a state that delivered the presidency for Joe Biden and elected two Democrats to the Senate, but that _still_ has a Republican governor. I know we can change that, and I'm not alone:
Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight is calling this race a _toss-up – _and now, POLITICO is reporting that Republicans plan to spend MASSIVELY to keep their party in power.
We can flip Arizona blue, elect our first Latino governor in almost 50 years and make so much progress for all our people – but I'm going to need everyone on this grassroots team with me to make it happen. **So please, I'm counting on your support: [Rush $5 or more now – before our critical midnight deadline – to become a Founding Donor of our campaign to defeat GOP extremism and flip Arizona blue!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37444122/311090173/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk263-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwYWU1ZmJmNS1lNjJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=E5MSpQXZOXtH7FxNIG_F_DDlok4xSXigrBh-3HEfP_s=)**
Thanks for joining me in this fight.

Marco Lopez
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

name: Save Warnock (via When Democrats Turn Out)
subject: Warnock’s Proud Boys stalker: ”I will keep watching for the signal”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, Last Friday at 4 AM the FBI raided the home of a top Proud Boys leader, “seizing his computer, phone, and other electronics” according to _The Philadelphia Inquirer_. Look, these people aren't playing games. Donald Trump — who urged his Proud Boys supporters to storm the Capitol on January 6 and then delayed calling in the National Guard to give the Proud Boys time and cover — just tapped Herschel Walker to oust Warnock. Now CBS News reports that in the first five weeks of his campaign, Walker has raised an eye-popping $3.7 million. Members of the Proud Boys have stockpiled over 1,000 rounds of ammunition and threatened Raphael Warnock's life, writing “Dead men can't pass laws.” If Herschel Walker successfully steals Warnock's Senate seat, Mitch McConnell will regain control of the Senate overnight. That means: Goodbye, gun reform. Goodbye, voting rights. Hello, emboldened Proud Boys. Hello, Trump 2024. But CNN recently declared Warnock 2022's #1 most vulnerable Democrat. Now, we're doing everything we can to re-elect Warnock, but up against Trump & Co's millions, progressives are in for the electoral fight of our lives. Too many Democrats think we can afford to take it easy. YOU are to thank for Raphael Warnock's historic election, which gave Democrats a 50/50 Senate. Our American families received crucial COVID-19 relief money because of you. Please, we're asking for your urgent support right now to fight back against the Proud Boys efforts to intimidate and oust Raphael Warnock, to protect the Democrat Senate, and to defeat Trump's hand-picked candidate. **[Help us fight this, Peter: We can't keep playing defense. We NEED to raise $5,250 by Wednesday to catch up with the GOP's seven-figure offensive. Failure wouldn't just mean losing Warnock's strong progressive voice in the Capitol— it would mean losing our Democratic Senate. Don't hand the Republicans the keys to the country. Don't let Donald Trump keep emboldening right-wing domestic terrorists. Please, Peter, rush in $5, $10, $25, or even more right now and get this country back on the right track.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/37444234/311090618/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20211011_GEN_FDR_J&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI3YjlhZjBlLWU5MmEtZWMxMS05ODFmLWM4OTY2NTNiOTIwOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=ncTIietd2pTw75rXls_b9qdFLRANCi2ry1J71a496W4=)** | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, Last Friday at 4 AM the FBI raided the home of a top Proud Boys leader, “seizing his computer, phone, and other electronics” according to The Philadelphia Inquirer. Look, these people aren't playing games. Donald Trump — who urged his Proud Boys supporters to storm the Capitol on January 6 and then delayed calling in the National Guard to give the Proud Boys time and cover — just tapped Herschel Walker to oust Warnock. Now CBS News reports that in the first five weeks of his campaign, Walker has raised an eye-popping $3.7 million. Members of the Proud Boys have stockpiled over 1,000 rounds of ammunition and threatened Raphael Warnock's life, writing “Dead men can't pass laws.” If Herschel Walker successfully steals Warnock's Senate seat, Mitch McConnell will regain control of the Senate overnight. That means: Goodbye, gun reform. Goodbye, voting rights. Hello, emboldened Proud Boys. Hello, Trump 2024. But CNN recently declared Warnock 2022's #1 most vulnerable Democrat. Now, we're doing everything we can to re-elect Warnock, but up against Trump & Co's millions, progressives are in for the electoral fight of our lives. Too many Democrats think we can afford to take it easy. YOU are to thank for Raphael Warnock's historic election, which gave Democrats a 50/50 Senate. Our American families received crucial COVID-19 relief money because of you. Please, we're asking for your urgent support right now to fight back against the Proud Boys efforts to intimidate and oust Raphael Warnock, to protect the Democrat Senate, and to defeat Trump's hand-picked candidate. = | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = You are the reason Raphael Warnock ran for Senate in the first place, Peter. name: Team Ryan
subject: Yikes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1136%2E3611125%2EEY2U24 ][IMG]

Yikes, folks --

This week, Donald Trump is headlining the National Republican Senatorial
Committee’s donor retreat in Palm Beach, Florida.

We have no time to waste. Trump already made Ohio his TOP target when he
held his first rally of 2021 here and directly attacked Tim. There’s no
telling how many big-money donors he’ll recruit to try and keep this seat
red.

Not on our watch, folks. We need your help to stop Trump and his
cronies from electing a right-wing extremist to the Senate and giving
Republicans the majority.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5050?t=1007&akid=1136%2E3611125%2EEY2U24 ]Can you rush a donation now to stop Trump and the NRSC from winning
this race and handing Mitch McConnell control of the Senate?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5050?t=1008&akid=1136%2E3611125%2EEY2U24 ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5051?t=1009&akid=1136%2E3611125%2EEY2U24 ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5052?t=1010&akid=1136%2E3611125%2EEY2U24 ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5053?t=1011&akid=1136%2E3611125%2EEY2U24 ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5054?t=1012&akid=1136%2E3611125%2EEY2U24 ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5050?t=1013&akid=1136%2E3611125%2EEY2U24 ]Other Amount

Unlike Trump wannabes Josh Mandel and JD Vance, Tim will always put
workers first and fight to give everyday people a little breathing room.

Ohio is our best chance to hold and expand the Democratic majority in the
Senate, but Republican mega-donors and special interests will do
everything they can to stop us.

We have to match the NRSC’s big dollar donations with our unstoppable
grassroots team.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5050?t=1014&akid=1136%2E3611125%2EEY2U24 ]Can we count on you to chip in right now? Only with your help can we
flip this seat blue and expand the Democratic majority.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5050?t=1015&akid=1136%2E3611125%2EEY2U24 ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5051?t=1016&akid=1136%2E3611125%2EEY2U24 ]Donate $50

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5054?t=1019&akid=1136%2E3611125%2EEY2U24 ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/5050?t=1020&akid=1136%2E3611125%2EEY2U24 ]Other Amount

Together, let’s send Trump a message: we’re done with his toxic politics
and we’re ready to go to the mat for hard working Ohioans.

--Team Ryan

* * *
---
Friends,

Do not let Democrats fool you ‐ their insanely massive spending bill is just one more step towards a **Woke Socialist Wasteland.** The American worker and taxpayer will suffer tremendously and Liberal Elites will thrive.

I cannot sit by and watch this happen. If you are just as outraged by the bill as I am, chip in below and join my fight to continue crushing the liberal agenda! | [**STOP DEMOCRATS SPENDING**](http://links.tedbudd.com/u/click?_t=a2f7882adada427a931a38229f805105&_m=809148a28bc549b081ed5b17a44e5591&_e=dtEBpFt6nLDnU5fNm0504P7ATbTezOKLj3jdnmu97s_lRmBOIXUiWyoREEwq_IhErKTHyIQAnIMfXDB6nuBHsL6X8dMYS7YQtYgmivYNOBWWTcvcjbznmNX-rMPVOHTQsj1GPI81VIzFJfyAQAMXQCx-ZeSyBi6B-4dThCMi4jmByjCceKkbg0rfZqnbTIVEYrtEXew_91P8vqO0iVOAxBLTqTiGd8ZZRsl1oKPHq5pYslYFAvDk1-q4iuAJcDFsAqkO1_ONY5Ax3BxiuwWVbmka0Wu7G2NcepLLGPCazHl5FCIKYUnneUomi8LPpfNAFqv_v6BsLH9iYoswLAv29hmZlcuD_utKhVt56B2TMXPGPEbM9AbviUhUwhiCmS5BbGcvQXJIZRRJeLanEHwnLGDoj6kBdtkbTmIzv3fnyIdr_240VK5BcCdZtEGmDwuozt7oglpJV_ksHchRyGou_COT_zd8k9aqg8EGtJLk4PE%3D)

I'll be honest with you, Peter, my opponent has had an impressive two quarters. She is well funded by the far-Left and millionaires from California and New York, but what she doesn't have is you.
**YOU** understand that Trump's legacy and the future of our nation is at stake in this election
**YOU** understand that my opponent spent years in Congress working to stop every single conservative achievement
**YOU** understand that the only way we can keep Florida red is if we work and stay together
I'll say it again, Peter; **we cannot come out of the gate slowly this quarter.**

Anything you can give will make an enormous difference in everything we do.

Thank you for being a loyal supporter,
Marco Rubio

body:
California will be losing a seat in Congress for the first time, which means our district lines here in CA-01 are sure to change. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37444653/311092288/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzdlYjE4Ny1lZDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2oqgHdNwz2kWFeMiyxw2UwFtc8P4yLAO2zulhwdcEco=)
Friend,

I've gotten a lot of campaign advice from so-called political "experts" who have questioned why I'm taking on a five-term incumbent like Doug LaMalfa. They told me that this district is too red and that I'd never stand a chance.

Well I disagree. This is a redistricting year and it's not the first time I've overcome being written off by naysayers.

**[If you want to help me prove them wrong, chip in $3 to send a message that we have what it takes to win this district.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37444654/311092289/-209993060?refcode=em-101121-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzdlYjE4Ny1lZDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2oqgHdNwz2kWFeMiyxw2UwFtc8P4yLAO2zulhwdcEco=)**

---

Here's an update on where things stand with redistricting:

We just got new data from the US Census Bureau, and it looks like due to a slowdown in growth, California will be losing a seat in Congress for the first time. That means our district lines here in CA-01 are sure to change.

**New lines will make LaMalfa uncomfortable.** He'll have to talk to new voters who haven't heard of him, and I bet he'll have a real tough time explaining why he's spending more time going to bat for Trump and making excuses for the Jan. 6th insurrectionists, than our working families, farmers, and small businesses.

**We can reach those voters before LaMalfa.** We have a better platform for stopping the wildfires, working to solve the problems that have led to California's megadrought, raising wages for working people, and ensuring the North State way of life isn't out of reach for future generations.

**I KNOW we can win this, and I can tell you there are a ton of folks in this community who agree. I'm talking to them every day, but I can't reach every new voter, which is why I'm asking for your help:**

**[Will you chip in $3 to help me get a start on my mid-month goal? I'm coming up $5,127 short of where we need to be before 11:59 pm tonight. Anything you give goes straight toward reaching more voters and giving LaMalfa the fight of his political career>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37444656/311092291/-209993060?refcode=em-101121-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzdlYjE4Ny1lZDJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2oqgHdNwz2kWFeMiyxw2UwFtc8P4yLAO2zulhwdcEco=)**

Thanks,

Max

name: Mark Takano
subject: I was publicly outed as gay by my Republican opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
In the face of such discriminatory attacks, I didn’t give up.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37444777/311093693/-2042826227?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmUwZTg1Ny1lZjJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Li4vsaeIeh8Jcf8CMz9zi6P2WUC8QpdBvFsjBnG1II0=)
---
Peter,

Today is National Coming Out Day and in honor of this occasion, I want to be vulnerable with you for a moment and share my personal painful story about my own coming out experience.

**In 1994, my Republican opponent outed me as gay with bigoted and homophobic ads to our district. I hadn’t even come out publicly yet!**

For members of the LGBTQ+ community, coming out is an extremely personal and sensitive moment. So, you can imagine my horror and heartbreak upon finding out I had been outed so publicly in such a hateful way. I was crushed.

**I ended up losing that extremely competitive race and it wasn’t until 18 years later that I finally won my race for Congress in 2012.**

Peter, I’m so glad that in the face of such discriminatory attacks, I didn’t give up.

Now, I can fight for LGBTQ+ equality and dignity in our nation’s capital and stand up for other marginalized Americans.

But sadly, since 2012, Republican bigotry and vitriol has not slowed down. Trump’s MAGA Republicans have spread hatred and divisiveness around the world while Republican state legislatures are passing anti-LGBTQ+ legislation as fast as they can. [**Peter, in 1994 when I was attacked for my identity, I lost my race because I didn’t have good people like you by my side. But now I do -- and I’m hoping that I can count on you to chip in $3 to help me fight back against hateful Republicans and stop their anti-LGBTQ+ agenda. Will you help me raise $10,000 before midnight? »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37444784/311093705/232128462?amount=3&refcode=MTFC_20211011_EMDF_E1_T0_OP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmUwZTg1Ny1lZjJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Li4vsaeIeh8Jcf8CMz9zi6P2WUC8QpdBvFsjBnG1II0=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/37444790/311093735/232128462?amount=3&amounts=3,7,10&express_lane=true&refcode=MTFC_20211011_EMDF_E1_T0_OP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmUwZTg1Ny1lZjJhLWVjMTEtOTgxZi1jODk2NjUzYjkyMDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Li4vsaeIeh8Jcf8CMz9zi6P2WUC8QpdBvFsjBnG1II0=)

clean_body: In the face of such discriminatory attacks, I didn’t give up. | = Peter, Today is National Coming Out Day and in honor of this occasion, I want to be vulnerable with you for a moment and share my personal painful story about my own coming out experience. In 1994, my Republican opponent outed me as gay with bigoted and homophobic ads to our district. I hadn’t even come out publicly yet! For members of the LGBTQ+ community, coming out is an extremely personal and sensitive moment. So, you can imagine my horror and heartbreak upon finding out I had been outed so publicly in such a hateful way. I was crushed. I ended up losing that extremely competitive race and it wasn’t until 18 years later that I finally won my race for Congress in 2012. Peter, I’m so glad that in the face of such discriminatory attacks, I didn’t give up. Now, I can fight for LGBTQ+ equality and dignity in our nation’s capital and stand up for other marginalized Americans. But sadly, since 2012, Republican bigotry and vitriol has not slowed down. Trump’s MAGA Republicans have spread hatred and divisiveness around the world while Republican state legislatures are passing anti-LGBTQ+ legislation as fast as they can. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = Thank you so much -- I’m so glad to have your support. Sincerely, Mark Takano | | Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P.O. name: Ammon Bundy for Governor
subject: Don’t forget to register for the Virtual Townhall with Ammon Bundy (LIVE TOMORROW)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by [Ammon Bundy for Governor](https://www
body:
| | [](https://www.votebundy.com)
---
| Hey Peter,

Don’t forget that tomorrow night at 7:00 PM is my very first Virtual Townhall for the Ammon Bundy for Governor campaign. This is a LIVE Townhall, held online where you can chat and interact with me in realtime, just like if we were in a big auditorium somewhere.

I have lots of stuff to share with you including:

1\. My brand new COVID-19 Encyclopedia of Truth and Facts.
2\. The Special Report entitled, How to Stop the Vaccine Mandate, Keep Your Job, and Preserve Your Freedom.
3\. Updates on the campaign including our upcoming campaign video being created by a professional Hollywood video producer.
4\. Important information about how to protect your family during this time of panic, fear, and tyranny.
5\. And of course, questions and answers LIVE, and in realtime.

IF you have NOT already registered for the LIVE Virtual Townhall tomorrow at 7:00 pm Mountain Time. Register for the Virtual Towhnall by simply clicking the link below: <https://www.votebundy.com/live/>

We will start on time at 7:00 pm, so we suggest you join at least 10 minutes early to ensure there is enough room for you (we have a limit of 500 people—if too many people login before you, you won’t be able to join. So just login 10 minutes early and you should be fine).

We’ll see you tomorrow at the Virtual Townhall!Ammon Bundy

* * *

My name is Marcus Flowers and I am an Army veteran running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and restore civility and common sense to our political discourse.

As someone who spent a decade of my life serving in war zones, I’m sick of seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene and the other leaders of the alt-right hijack the phrase "patriotism" to serve their own vile beliefs. I know patriotism -- and the reality is they’re the farthest thing from it.

**Through my work serving overseas on four continents, I’ve seen firsthand the damage done by radicalism, extremism, disinformation, lawlessness, and propaganda -- and after seeing Marjorie Taylor Greene bring her conspiracy theories and hatred to my home district? I knew I had to get in the race.**

[ ](http://email.magaactionalert.com/c/eJyNkE1v4yAQhn8NuWHB4IBz8CGxXUVVpFZptVeLDCShwh_CuFH31y9Os3vYUyWExDMzj5jXlJCrXNiVK4EB54xzYKzIRcazegfVrpbNdivFulCM5KzTF60xuqHX3oaY4dCtrqWxuEbIxUmtJcdCAd9oc9YauGIbIfXKl9cYx4mILYGndCaLc7DZzfXBmkWSWLS6o1cbJrxaT12PiZkJkY6D99R8BBqIeJpj107DHNASUQf7SUAuCHU3anfpE1zaH7Szxs1dYrbTboETpsf3nqxo983xrdo3h7Zp2vr52NZvVUVfXw6H9tj8Wshf-dBH28c02qOn77div1af6rdM5bb3zqTCf3C6Q2BCq83mRDnKM81BanoSAqm2ggOeDOMpmlCa8ea8d5NUKeDL8tN7rGkj785fJVE7AjDPSQlwTxB-Il6aoUp3_Brtv8mHNHsEAkTVfwBJ7pr7)

We're going to have to work around the clock – day and night – for the next 400+ days to pull off a victory for conservatives in Georgia and around the country.

We're going to recruit thousands of volunteers to help us register new voters, knock on doors, put out signs, get our message out, and get our supporters to the polls.

clean_body: The DSCC and Democrat establishment know they can't hold onto the Senate majority without winning in Georgia. | Friend, The panicked screengrab from the Senate Democrats' email says it all: The Democrats in Washington are watching our campaign like a hawk because they know that we are a genuine threat to their continued majority in the United States Senate. Honestly, their desperation shows. They seem to be in a panic. They're sending upwards of 3 emails a day because they know that their hold on the Georgia Senate seat is precarious. It took a perfect storm for Georgia to elect Raphael Warnock to the U.S. Senate in the January runoff election, and I guarantee you that storm isn't coming around again next year. We're going to have to work around the clock – day and night – for the next 400+ days to pull off a victory for conservatives in Georgia and around the country. We're going to recruit thousands of volunteers to help us register new voters, knock on doors, put out signs, get our message out, and get our supporters to the polls. And, of course, it all takes money to operate. Democrats are in panic mode. They didn't want me to get into this race because they know that with President Trump's support and the support of the good people in Georgia, we're going to flip this seat in one of the most hard-fought races in the country. Peter that is why I am reaching out to you today. If I am elected to be the next Senator from Georgia, I will be YOUR VOICE in Washington. name: Josh Mandel
subject: They are obsessed with power
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Josh A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc
body:
Peter, President Trump’s legacy is **UNDER ATTACK**. Joe Biden and the Democrats will do whatever it takes to completely **ERASE** all that we accomplished under President Trump’s America First agenda. **Why?** Because the Democrats are obsessed with power and have no interest in doing what is best for the American people. We **MUS** T take back the Senate for conservatives to stop Joe Biden’s anti-American agenda from destroying our great nation, but we can’t do it without you. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Exclusive: Counterfeiters Beware
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
You won't believe this |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=b6be4fb7bc&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

What a whirlwind. The last week has taken me around the country to fight for election integrity and spread it nationwide.

I just wrapped up in Iowa where I spoke at the _Save America Rally_ with President Donald Trump, fighting for our need for a 50-state audit, an audit of Pima county, and also for my Ballot Integrity Project!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=36d2e2926c&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| _“What a job he’s done – Mark, great job, Mark! You’re going to win big, Mark!” – President Trump_
The rally was a great chance to see thousands of proud Patriots united, standing against the tyranny of the Left and for President Donald Trump!

**I am proud to have been invited to speak and endorsed by the President. We are making a great team heading into 2022. And yes – the President was right, we will win BIG! **

_In the middle of the rally, he gave me a HUGE shoutout to the work that I and my campaign have been doing. I am deeply honored that he would be so confident in our victory._

**He said this in front of the thousands in attendance and the over 100,000 people watching because he knew as a matter of a fact that I am the patriot who will continue the good fight in Arizona for election integrity and as Secretary of State!**

_[But only with continued support from Patriots like you. Can you stand with President Trump and help my campaign for Secretary of State with a donation of $25, $100, $250, $500, or more today?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2e3d2b9b48&e=44b8c466b0)_
**_Taking the Arizona Ballot Integrity Project National_**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=ff2cc59387&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| This last, Wednesday, I assembled a group of over 30 patriots, election officials, election integrity activists, and technology experts in Dallas Texas to take my Arizona Ballot Integrity Project National by meeting with the company _Authentix_ to discuss how we can make our ballots more secure.

_Authentix_ is amazing at what they do. They are international authenticators, authenticating currencies, pharmaceuticals, agrochemicals, and tax stamps.

**They are good at what they do. **This is why I sought them out to work with me to develop significant countermeasures to ensure the sanctity of the ballot.
Working in tandem with me, they took on an innovative, never-been-done project, for the good of America!

_Human Events_ reports:

_When asked how he got the idea to initially launch the BIP, Finchem said, “Back between September and November of last year there were rumors circulating that somehow ballots had been secretly watermarked. Those rumors were not true. But it got me to thinking, what if they could be?”_

_That question ultimately led to him being introduced to the Chief Sales & Marketing Officer of Authentix, Kent Mansfield. “At first I didn’t know what to think when I got the request,” said Mansfield. “We had never done a project exactly like this, but I also knew Mark was serious about making this happen. Without any spec’s, this was an open opportunity for our people to create. I worked with our teams to design a concept and once we had it, it took about thirty days to produce a prototype.”_

**And, man, did they take this project seriously. We now have the technology to actually make it impossible for anyone to commit fraud with these ballots. And if the results of the Maricopa Audit prove anything, we need those ballots now more than ever.**

_Human Events_ continues:

_When asked about the potential problem of steering people toward paper ballots in a nation obsessed with the bells and whistles of digital security, Mansfield says,” We get that question all the time. It is often the case that a newer technology comes along that can be deployed that simply wasn’t available at the time that the last technology was deployed. This is brand new technology. It is a way to serialize documents. It can let people know that the document that left is the actual document that came back.” This lets people track and interact with their ballot and the government can know it is a legitimate ballot.”_

---
|
---
| Folks, this is going to go national if we continue our momentum in our fight for Election Integrity.

_I had seven different states approach me who are interested in getting started on this, and 38 more that are interested in learning more. This is huge. This level of interest is why I led this meeting in Dallas over this last Wednesday._
**_The Fight Continues At Home_**
[And while I continue to push for a nationwide audit and educate other patriots about what they can and _should_ do in their home states, the fight must continue at home.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=c5676a23c5&e=44b8c466b0)

In addition to auditing Pima County, the second largest County in Arizona, we must continue to push for these _Authentix_ ballots in Arizona.

**To do this, what is important to know is that money _is_ earmarked for these new ballots, but we need to get our process legislatively approved. With a narrow majority in the House and Senate, we need all the help that we can get to push this through.**

We need to Audit Pima. We need to push hard and expand our grassroots effort to ensure that the Ballot Integrity Process I pioneered gets final approval. Only then can we begin to have safe elections.

[**_Please help us audit Pima and get our Ballot Integrity Process into law with a generous donation today!_**](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=96291f41e1&e=44b8c466b0)

clean_body: You won't believe this | | | | | Dear , What a whirlwind. The last week has taken me around the country to fight for election integrity and spread it nationwide. I just wrapped up in Iowa where I spoke at the Save America Rally with President Donald Trump, fighting for our need for a 50-state audit, an audit of Pima county, and also for my Ballot Integrity Project! | | “What a job he’s done – Mark, great job, Mark! You’re going to win big, Mark!” – President Trump The rally was a great chance to see thousands of proud Patriots united, standing against the tyranny of the Left and for President Donald Trump! I am proud to have been invited to speak and endorsed by the President. We are making a great team heading into 2022. And yes – the President was right, we will win BIG! In the middle of the rally, he gave me a HUGE shoutout to the work that I and my campaign have been doing. I am deeply honored that he would be so confident in our victory. He said this in front of the thousands in attendance and the over 100,000 people watching because he knew as a matter of a fact that I am the patriot who will continue the good fight in Arizona for election integrity and as Secretary of State! Taking the Arizona Ballot Integrity Project National | | This last, Wednesday, I assembled a group of over 30 patriots, election officials, election integrity activists, and technology experts in Dallas Texas to take my Arizona Ballot Integrity Project National by meeting with the company Authentix to discuss how we can make our ballots more secure. Authentix is amazing at what they do. They are international authenticators, authenticating currencies, pharmaceuticals, agrochemicals, and tax stamps. They are good at what they do. This is why I sought them out to work with me to develop significant countermeasures to ensure the sanctity of the ballot. Working in tandem with me, they took on an innovative, never-been-done project, for the good of America! Human Events reports: When asked how he got the idea to initially launch the BIP, Finchem said, “Back between September and November of last year there were rumors circulating that somehow ballots had been secretly watermarked. Those rumors were not true. But it got me to thinking, what if they could be?” That question ultimately led to him being introduced to the Chief Sales & Marketing Officer of Authentix, Kent Mansfield. “At first I didn’t know what to think when I got the request,” said Mansfield. “We had never done a project exactly like this, but I also knew Mark was serious about making this happen. Without any spec’s, this was an open opportunity for our people to create. I worked with our teams to design a concept and once we had it, it took about thirty days to produce a prototype.” And, man, did they take this project seriously. We now have the technology to actually make it impossible for anyone to commit fraud with these ballots. And if the results of the Maricopa Audit prove anything, we need those ballots now more than ever. Human Events continues: When asked about the potential problem of steering people toward paper ballots in a nation obsessed with the bells and whistles of digital security, Mansfield says,” We get that question all the time. It is often the case that a newer technology comes along that can be deployed that simply wasn’t available at the time that the last technology was deployed. This is brand new technology. It is a way to serialize documents. It can let people know that the document that left is the actual document that came back.” This lets people track and interact with their ballot and the government can know it is a legitimate ballot.” | | Folks, this is going to go national if we continue our momentum in our fight for Election Integrity. I had seven different states approach me who are interested in getting started on this, and 38 more that are interested in learning more. This is huge. This level of interest is why I led this meeting in Dallas over this last Wednesday. The Fight Continues At Home In addition to auditing Pima County, the second largest County in Arizona, we must continue to push for these Authentix ballots in Arizona. To do this, what is important to know is that money is earmarked for these new ballots, but we need to get our process legislatively approved. With a narrow majority in the House and Senate, we need all the help that we can get to push this through. We need to Audit Pima. We need to push hard and expand our grassroots effort to ensure that the Ballot Integrity Process I pioneered gets final approval. Only then can we begin to have safe elections. | God Bless You, | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot P.S. I am trying to Audit Pima County. If you support my efforts, . PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE | | | Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved. clean_body: | | | | [Confidential Form] Friend, When I received the FULL ENDORSEMENT of President Trump I was so honored! I was grateful for everything he’s done for Alaska. But now ALL of it has been destroyed by the Radical Left and Joe Biden, and his Chief Enabling Officer, Lisa Murkowski! President Trump was the greatest President Alaska has ever had! But I need to know, do you still stand with him? DO YOU STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP? The Far-Left is doing everything they can right now to destroy the legacy and progress of President Trump! In the Senate, I will always fight for our America First Conservative agenda because we know Insiders like Liberal Lisa Murkowski are DESTROYING America. I am proud to stand with President Trump! Do you? DO YOU STAND WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP? Thanks, Kelly | | | | =

name: Rick Scott
subject: I’m going to meet President Trump in Mar-a-Lago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
I’ll be with President Trump | Friend,

TOMORROW, I’m heading to Mar-a-Lago to meet with the one and only: President Donald J. Trump.

In addition to discussing our plan for WINNING BACK our critical Republican Majority next year, I want him to know how many people support him...

**If you’re a TOP TRUMP SUPPORTER, ADD YOUR NAME, Friend.**

name: Cody Pruitt
subject: No one’s ever built a campaign like this before in Kentucky, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Hi Peter — I’m
Cody, the Organizing Director for the Booker campaign.

Together, we are building the largest statewide deep organizing campaign
in Kentucky’s history. That means inviting as many Kentuckians as possible
to raise their voices in this upcoming election — especially those who
have been historically disenfranchised from voting and folks who typically
don’t turn out in big numbers in our elections.

We know that in particular inviting young folks to join our organizing
work is critical. That’s why our campaign recently started a Students for
Booker organizing program. Here’s a photo of our first Zoom meeting
together:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11030?refcode=em20211011-1051&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=1051%2E346206%2ElrJX_w ][IMG]

It’s going to take a young and diverse coalition to defeat Rand Paul and
realize a bold vision for Kentucky’s future. So today, I wanted to reach
out to you today for a favor: [ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11030?refcode=em20211011-1051&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1051%2E346206%2ElrJX_w ]Will you make a $5
donation to power our new student organizing program, help pay for our
voter registration tools, and fund our organizing trainings?

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11030?refcode=em20211011-1051&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1051%2E346206%2ElrJX_w ]Contribute $5

** It costs about $0.05 for a student organizer to reach out to one voter
in Kentucky. That means if you give $5 right now, we can reach 100
Kentuckians! **

No one’s ever built a movement like this before in
Kentucky,
Peter.

But we know this is how we’re going to defeat Rand Paul and finally usher
in a new chapter of politics to our Commonwealth.

Charles understands that young people are key to transforming Kentucky’s
future. These incredible young leaders aren’t waiting around for change to
come — they’re stepping up now to mobilize their peers to vote and make
their voices heard.

We already have organizers from more than 13 universities and colleges in
Kentucky signed up to join our organizing program. If we continue growing
this momentum, we can turn out the young votes like never before to win
this race.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/11030?refcode=em20211011-1051&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1051%2E346206%2ElrJX_w ]Our organizing team is depending on grassroots donations from folks
like you,
Peter, so we can establish
voting registration centers at as many college campuses as possible.
Please chip in $5 or anything you can to show your support
and power this critical early organizing work.

Together,

Cody Pruitt
Organizing Director
Booker for Kentucky

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211011-1051-footer&t=1024&refcode2=1051_346206_lrJX_w&akid=1051%2E346206%2ElrJX_w

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1051%2E346206%2ElrJX_w

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
