name: Alvin Williams (BAMPAC)
subject: They'll stop at nothing to destroy him...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Black America's PAC
body:
He's the Democrats' Enemy #1, and they'll stop at nothing to destroy him... -
| | | | |
---
| | | |
---
| | | | Dear Mr. Willis, The Democrats have unleashed a vicious, **all-out assault** on Senator Tim Scott... "Uncle Tim" and "Token Uncle Tom" "You're the lowest piece of sh*t this country ever produced" "A traitor to the black community" ...and they won't stop until they've destroyed his reputation, his career, and his life like they've done to Dr. Carson, Sheriff Clarke, and so many other Black conservatives before him. [I'm hoping you'll Endorse Tim Scott for Senate this election and help him fight back against the Democrats' vicious attacks...](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=61493&info=2021EA1101&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseScott&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1101&n=1) **...but first let me explain why Democrats are so desperate to destroy Senator Tim Scott.** [](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=61493&info=2021EA1101&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseScott&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1101&n=2)As you may know, Senator Tim Scott recently delivered the official Republican rebuttal to Joe Biden's address to a Joint Session of Congress. In his speech, Senator Scott declared that "_America is not a racist country_ ," setting fire to the foundation of the radical Left's empire of racist lies. In response, Left-wing activists set out to prove him wrong by being shockingly racist themselves and... **...making "**Uncle Tim** " one of the top trending terms on Twitter for 12 full hours!** The news media responded to Tim's speech by ushering out their "blacktivist" shills to attack him, blast his speech, reassert that the Republican Party (and America as a whole) are **racist** , and pour even more gasoline on the fires of racial tension. _Evidently oblivious to their own hypocrisy_ , CNN contributors argued that Senator Scott can't claim America is not racist because he admitted in his speech that _liberals_ frequently call him "Uncle Tim" and the N-word... [](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=61493&info=2021EA1101&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseScott&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1101&n=3)...with one commentator, _as if to drive the point home_ , saying, "I would never call Scott an Uncle Tom. It's an insult to the character Uncle Tom." That's right. The mainstream media's response to Tim Scott's powerful and unifying message to the nation was basically: "You can't say America is not racist because liberals ARE racist. Here, let us show you, Uncle Tom!" **Sadly, being attacked, slandered, and ridiculed by liberals is nothing new for those of us who have the audacity to be Black __and__ Republican.** After all, the Democrats ruthlessly attack Black conservatives like Senator Scott, Dr. Ben Carson, Sheriff Clarke, and myself in order to destroy our credibility, trust-worthiness, and status within the Black Community... ...because, unlike conservatives of other races, we can speak directly to the Black Community and **EXPOSE** the Liberal Lies about "racist" conservatives the keep Blacks voting for Democrats. But due to his respectful, agreeable, and quiet nature, Senator Tim Scott has operated under the radar and out of the Democrats' crosshairs for much of his career in the U.S. Senate... **...but all of that changed last year in the wake of George Floyd's death and the subsequent protests, unrest, and riots.** You see, for the previous five years in the U.S. Senate, Tim Scott had been doing everything possible to convince Democrats to work together to pass meaningful, bipartisan Police Reform legislation. After all, who better to lead this effort than one of the only U.S. Senators with real life, personal experience with this issue? **But for five years, the Democrats REFUSED to even take up Tim's police reform bill, RAILROADED his efforts, and IGNORED his warnings that this would blow up in their faces.** However, now that police reform was front-and-center and had the overwhelming support of most Americans, he believed the Democrats would finally work together to craft and pass much-needed police reform legislation. But what Tim Scott, _being an honest & trusting person_, didn't realize at that time (and learned the hard way) was... **...working with Republicans, especially Black Republicans, to solve problems facing the Black Community is _never_ on the Democrats' agenda because it would undermine their BIG LIE that "**Republicans are racist.** "** So instead of taking this rare opportunity to work together to actually solve a big issue, the Democrats launched an all-out media blitz to **LIE** about the contents of the bill and to viciously **slander** Tim Scott for even trying... ...with Nancy Pelosi going so far as to say that Tim Scott's police reform bill was just Republicans "**trying to get away with the murder, actually, the murder of George Floyd.** " Despite Senator Scott adding _everything_ the Democrats wanted into his bill, offering 20+ amendments, giving rewrite authority, and more... **...the Democrats still**BLOCKED** this crucial police reform bill from even being brought to the Senate floor for debate.** | "He proposed legislation to fix blue state, Democrat-run cities' police departments. What'd the Democrats do? **They insulted him, and they blocked the bill**... because they don't want a solution... They want the issue." \- The late Rush Limbaugh
---
Immediately after Democrats blocked the bill, Senator Scott took to the floor of the Senate with the fiery resolve of a man on a mission...
...and he delivered an impassioned & powerful reprimand of the Democrats, calling them out for what he described as "**race politics at its worst** "...
"The actual problem is not what was being offered, it was who was offering it... They cannot allow [Republicans] to be seen as a party that reaches out to all communities in this nation."
"When Speaker Pelosi says one of the most heinous things I can imagine... She knows that she can say that because the Democrats have a monopoly on the black vote."
[](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=61493&info=2021EA1101&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseScott&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1101&n=4)Senator Scott eviscerated the Democrats by revealing they had "_no desire to solve problems before the election_ " because they NEED these problems to incite racial hatred towards Republicans and win elections.
Then, with a look of intense determination on his face, Senator Tim Scott said _the_ _last_ _words_ _the_ _Democrats_ _ever_ _wanted_ _to_ _hear_ _him_ _say_ :
"I'm willing to compete for their vote. Are you?"
Now, the once quiet and agreeable Senator from South Carolina is on fire. He's on a mission to...
**☐** | **EXPOSE** the LIE that conservatives are all racists
---|---
**☐** | **RECLAIM** Black voters from the Democrat Party
**☐** | **END** the Democrats' stranglehold on Black voters
Tim has taken the lead on the nationwide effort to reach out to Black voters with the truth – and his damning critiques of the Democrat Party are ringing true and spreading like wildfire within the Black Community.
He's opening their eyes to the race-baiting LIES by unmasking the Democrats as opportunistic, self-serving politicians who've done nothing but prey on Blacks for decades with lies, empty promises, and failed policies...
**...igniting an exodus of Black voters from the Democrat Party.**
_And_ _the_ _Democrats_ _know_ _that_ _if_ _they_ _lose_ _their_ _stranglehold_ _on_ _Black_ _voters_ , _it'll_ _be_ _impossible_ _for_ _them_ _to_ _ever_ _win_ _another_ _election_!
That's why Democrats are so terrified of Tim Scott and THEY'LL STOP AT NOTHING TO SHUT HIM UP!
[And that's why your signed endorsement to Tim Scott is so important!](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=61493&info=2021EA1101&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseScott&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1101&n=5)
Once I receive your signed endorsement, I'll send it directly to Senator Scott so he'll know patriotic conservatives like you have his back!
[Along with your signed endorsement, I pray you'll also make an urgent contribution of $35, $50, $100 or more to help recruit your fellow conservatives to endorse & support Senator Tim Scott.](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=61493&info=2021EA1101&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseScott&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1101&n=6)
Or perhaps you understand how important Senator Tim Scott is to reclaiming Black voters, and you'd like to do more to help?
[Your generous contribution of $250, $500, $1000 or more will help purchase the critical advertising needed to beat back the Democrats' attacks and propel Senator Tim Scott to victory this election!](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=61493&info=2021EA1101&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseScott&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1101&n=7)
**Remember, the Democrats have unleashed an all-out assault to destroy Senator Tim Scott because he's empowering Black voters to leave the Democrat Party once-and-for-all...**
**...and the Democrats know that without their stranglehold on Black voters, it'll be impossible for them to ever win again.**
[So please sign your endorsement to Senator Tim Scott and make an urgent contribution of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000 or more to help beat back the Democrats' attacks and propel Senator Scott to victory this election!](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=61493&info=2021EA1101&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseScott&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1101&n=8)
[Or if you can't afford that much right now, then please give $28 or even $20.22 as a symbol of your support.](https://www.bampac.org/endorsetimscott?recruiter_id=61493&info=2021EA1101&sal=Peter&utm_content=EndorseScott&utm_client=BPAC&e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1101&n=9)
Thank you, and God Bless.
|
Alvin Williams
President
---|---
| | | |

Contributions are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. ---

If you're giving up on these patriots, then please [click here](https://www.bampac.org/unsubscribe?e=523b6806226ba5e2de52820de3975f18&utm_source=bampac&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2021ea1101&n=10) to STOP receiving emails from Black America's PAC.

In response, Left-wing activists set out to prove him wrong by being shockingly racist themselves and... ...making "Uncle Tim " one of the top trending terms on Twitter for 12 full hours! The news media responded to Tim's speech by ushering out their "blacktivist" shills to attack him, blast his speech, reassert that the Republican Party (and America as a whole) are racist , and pour even more gasoline on the fires of racial tension. Evidently oblivious to their own hypocrisy , CNN contributors argued that Senator Scott can't claim America is not racist because he admitted in his speech that liberals frequently call him "Uncle Tim" and the N-word... one commentator, as if to drive the point home , saying, "I would never call Scott an Uncle Tom. It's an insult to the character Uncle Tom." That's right. The mainstream media's response to Tim Scott's powerful and unifying message to the nation was basically: "You can't say America is not racist because liberals ARE racist. Here, let us show you, Uncle Tom!" Sadly, being attacked, slandered, and ridiculed by liberals is nothing new for those of us who have the audacity to be Black and Republican. After all, the Democrats ruthlessly attack Black conservatives like Senator Scott, Dr. Ben Carson, Sheriff Clarke, and myself in order to destroy our credibility, trust-worthiness, and status within the Black Community... ...because, unlike conservatives of other races, we can speak directly to the Black Community and EXPOSE the Liberal Lies about "racist" conservatives the keep Blacks voting for Democrats. But due to his respectful, agreeable, and quiet nature, Senator Tim Scott has operated under the radar and out of the Democrats' crosshairs for much of his career in the U.S. Senate... ...but all of that changed last year in the wake of George Floyd's death and the subsequent protests, unrest, and riots. You see, for the previous five years in the U.S. Senate, Tim Scott had been doing everything possible to convince Democrats to work together to pass meaningful, bipartisan Police Reform legislation. After all, who better to lead this effort than one of the only U.S. Senators with real life, personal experience with this issue? But for five years, the Democrats REFUSED to even take up Tim's police reform bill, RAILROADED his efforts, and IGNORED his warnings that this would blow up in their faces. However, now that police reform was front-and-center and had the overwhelming support of most Americans, he believed the Democrats would finally work together to craft and pass much-needed police reform legislation. But what Tim Scott, being an honest & trusting person, didn't realize at that time (and learned the hard way) was... ...working with Republicans, especially Black Republicans, to solve problems facing the Black Community is never on the Democrats' agenda because it would undermine their BIG LIE that "Republicans are racist. " So instead of taking this rare opportunity to work together to actually solve a big issue, the Democrats launched an all-out media blitz to LIE about the contents of the bill and to viciously slander Tim Scott for even trying... ...with Nancy Pelosi going so far as to say that Tim Scott's police reform bill was just Republicans "trying to get away with the murder, actually, the murder of George Floyd. " Despite Senator Scott adding everything the Democrats wanted into his bill, offering 20+ amendments, giving rewrite authority, and more... ...the Democrats stillBLOCKED this crucial police reform bill from even being brought to the Senate floor for debate. | "He proposed legislation to fix blue state, Democrat-run cities' police departments. What'd the Democrats do? They insulted him, and they blocked the bill... because they don't want a solution... They want the issue." \- The late Rush Limbaugh Immediately after Democrats blocked the bill, Senator Scott took to the floor of the Senate with the fiery resolve of a man on a mission... ...and he delivered an impassioned & powerful reprimand of the Democrats, calling them out for what he described as "race politics at its worst "... "The actual problem is not what was being offered, it was who was offering it... They cannot allow [Republicans] to be seen as a party that reaches out to all communities in this nation." "When Speaker Pelosi says one of the most heinous things I can imagine... She knows that she can say that because the Democrats have a monopoly on the black vote." Scott eviscerated the Democrats by revealing they had "no desire to solve problems before the election " because they NEED these problems to incite racial hatred towards Republicans and win elections. Then, with a look of intense determination on his face, Senator Tim Scott said the last words the Democrats ever wanted to hear him say : "I'm willing to compete for their vote. Are you?" Now, the once quiet and agreeable Senator from South Carolina is on fire. He's on a mission to... ☐ | EXPOSE the LIE that conservatives are all racists ---|--- ☐ | RECLAIM Black voters from the Democrat Party ☐ | END the Democrats' stranglehold on Black voters Tim has taken the lead on the nationwide effort to reach out to Black voters with the truth – and his damning critiques of the Democrat Party are ringing true and spreading like wildfire within the Black Community. He's opening their eyes to the race-baiting LIES by unmasking the Democrats as opportunistic, self-serving politicians who've done nothing but prey on Blacks for decades with lies, empty promises, and failed policies... ...igniting an exodus of Black voters from the Democrat Party. And the Democrats know that if they lose their stranglehold on Black voters , it'll be impossible for them to ever win another election! That's why Democrats are so terrified of Tim Scott and THEY'LL STOP AT NOTHING TO SHUT HIM UP! Once I receive your signed endorsement, I'll send it directly to Senator Scott so he'll know patriotic conservatives like you have his back! Or perhaps you understand how important Senator Tim Scott is to reclaiming Black voters, and you'd like to do more to help? Remember, the Democrats have unleashed an all-out assault to destroy Senator Tim Scott because he's empowering Black voters to leave the Democrat Party once-and-for-all... ...and the Democrats know that without their stranglehold on Black voters, it'll be impossible for them to ever win again.** Thank you, and God Bless. | Alvin Williams President ---|--- | | | | | | | | © Black America's Political Action Committee Paid for by Black America's PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions are not tax deductible for income tax purposes. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in a calendar year. You're receiving this email because you support Black conservatives like Burgess Owens, John James, and Tim Scott. If you're giving up on these patriots, then please to STOP receiving emails from Black America's PAC.

body:

| | [ ](https://Turnredmedia.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=621b2e320db082dad48a1a39c&id=2fb0f01c07&e=ae0ea222da)
---
| Friend,

Remember two weeks ago, when Tina Ramirez launched the Win Back the Suburbs PAC? It was launched to help candidates running in competitive suburban districts.

The Win Back the Suburbs PAC just announced the 1st Round of Donations:
* Roxann Robinson, 27th District
* Kim Taylor, 63rd District
* Mike Cherry, 66th District
* Mark Earley, JR, 68th District
* Chris Holmes, 72nd District

Tina is thrilled to be in a position to use the momentum of her campaign to help these fantastic candidates. She knows each of them personally and is proud to support them and their effort to take back Virginia this November.

There are only two states in the whole nation that have elections on November 2nd and Virginia is one of them. If we do not step up now and support our candidates running in competitive suburban districts, we will lose Virginia’s House, Senate, and office of the Governor.
Your individual rights, parental education rights, and economic freedoms are in danger if the Democrats take control.
-Team Tina Alerts

It was launched to help candidates running in competitive suburban districts. The Win Back the Suburbs PAC just announced the 1st Round of Donations: Roxann Robinson, 27th District Kim Taylor, 63rd District Mike Cherry, 66th District Mark Earley, JR, 68th District Chris Holmes, 72nd District Tina is thrilled to be in a position to use the momentum of her campaign to help these fantastic candidates. She knows each of them personally and is proud to support them and their effort to take back Virginia this November. There are only two states in the whole nation that have elections on November 2nd and Virginia is one of them. If we do not step up now and support our candidates running in competitive suburban districts, we will lose Virginia’s House, Senate, and office of the Governor. Your individual rights, parental education rights, and economic freedoms are in danger if the Democrats take control. -Team Tina Alerts | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Tina Ramirez for Congress, Inc., All rights reserved.

* **DEPORTING refugees at the border,** supporting racist rhetoric, a stupid border wall, and disenfranchising DREAMers in the United States

* **Railing AGAINST the LGBTQ+ community** \-- including an Amendment to BAN gay marriage in America

name: JOE BIDEN ALERT (via DCCC)
subject: Joe’s STUNNING announcement:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
When our President calls on us, we MUST deliver.
| | | **Joe Biden has asked you to step up.**

****[Did you see this?! President Joe Biden has called all of us to action to PROTECT our hard-fought House Majority and stop Trump and his House Republicans from rising to power again. When our President calls on us, we MUST deliver. We're calling for 500 gifts before midnight to answer Joe's call and fight for our House Majority. Will you chip in $3 to elect House Democrats? >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-)****

We're seriously disturbed.

**FIRST:** Republicans narrowed our House Majority to a razor-thin margin.

**THEN:** Trump and his Republicans helped incite a deadly insurrection at our nation's Capitol --_and as of 6pm, several of those rioters are running for Congress to destroy our House Majority!!_

**SO NOW:** We must answer President Biden's call to protect our House Majority and ensure these Republican cronies NEVER hold power!

[](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/-YK-)

**[We need to do everything in our power to stop these Republicans from defeating our House Majority. We're calling for 500 gifts in the door before midnight to ensure they never -- and we mean NEVER -- set foot in the halls of Congress to take back power. Can we count on your $3 right away to elect House Democrats? >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**

Frankly, we're appalled...

... Appalled that people like this would ever consider running for office.

... Appalled that Republicans WANT them in power.

... And appalled that, if they win, Trump could have an easier path back to the White House than ever before.

**[We'll fight tooth and nail to rescue our Majority -- but we're going to need your immediate help to pull it off. Can we count on your $3 before midnight? We're calling for 500 gifts to reach our goal and STOP these extremists from sabotaging our Democratic House Majority >>](https://links.e.dccc.)**
| | _If you 've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

The off-year in Democratic fundraising is a traditionally slow period.

But that’s no excuse.

The undeniable truth is that to defeat Madison Cawthorn, we need to be hitting each and every one of our fundraising goals -- and I cannot do that vital work without help from Democrats like you.

**I know we have the message to win and our new ad will help us do that, but we cannot get complacent.**

clean_body: Are you going to support a REAL LEADER? | Friend, If we’re going to Take Back the House in 2022, we've got to have strong leaders. We’ve got to have leaders that are battle-tested and not scared of the Radical Left. Leaders that aren’t going to cow down to Nancy Pelosi or the “Squad,” but are going to do what’s best for the American people. Esther Joy King is that leader. As a veteran, she knows what it means to fight and to not back down when you’re protecting something you care about. As a Congresswoman , I know she would make sure that our conservative values and freedoms are saved from the Left’s Socialist plans. She’s battle-tested and that’s what we need most right now in Congress. | I’m ecstatic to stand by a fellow service member and support her and she fights to serve the American people once again. I hope you’ll join me in supporting her and do whatever you can to make sure Esther Joy King helps Take Back the House in 2022! Thank you for your support and helping elect a great leader in advance, Congresswoman Miller-Meeks Paid for by Miller-Meeks for Congress Miller-Meeks for Congress P.O.
